Name: MNG

Our high-precision LiDAR scanning systems, such as LiAir (UAV/Fixed-Wing),  LiGrip (handheld), LiMobile (vehicle-mounted) and LiBackpack, help create smart cities and provide intelligent solutions in energy, agriculture, forestry, roadwork, geographic information (GIS), mining, and more. LiDAR360, LiDAR360 MLS, LiPowerline and other GVI software solutions provide core processing and analysis for accurate point cloud editing and visualization.

While expanding, our primary business efforts focus on innovation and producing breakthrough technology.

By fostering collaboration and leveraging advanced technology, Rasta.AI is paving the way for the future of road management, contributing to the development of smart cities and sustainable infrastructure worldwide. Join us in our mission to make roads safer and more reliable for everyone.

Name: STRYDE
Description:
STRYDE is a progressive kind of seismic company, reinventing subsurface imaging.

A breakthrough in small, lightweight, low-cost seismic receiver technology, enabling exploration and monitoring of our planet’s subsurface at ultra-high resolution by ensuring high-density seismic is affordable for everyone. 

With STRYDE, the constant trade-offs companies and governments make between cost, pace and quality - that prevent them from mapping the ground beneath - are broken forever.

Our focus today is unlocking seismic for everyone: oil and gas, mining and renewables; seismic acquisition with a much lower environmental footprint and a reduced risk to people.

Name: Benthic - UTEC
Description:
Benthic is a global leader in offshore marine geotechnical investigation, survey, analysis and design. The Company’s proprietary PROD technology has lead the way in high quality, ultra-deepwater site investigations, with capabilities in water depths up to 3,000m.  PROD stands for Portable Remotely Operated Drill - designed to take 100 meters of rock or sediment core samples from the ocean floor. Benthic takes pride in its groundbreaking technological innovations which help to overcome technical barriers, allowing their clients to gather data in environments that were considered inaccessible just a decade ago. 

The Company continues to invest in the future, with new technologies and processes that extend the boundaries of subsea investigation and analysis. Benthic’s flexible, solutions driven approach allows delivery of timely, high quality services to clients, tailored to their unique project objectives with fewer incidents along the way.

Our mission is to advance knowledge and improve understanding of mapping sciences to promote the responsible applications of photogrammetry, remote sensing, geographic information systems (GIS) and supporting technologies.

LiDAR & GIS post-processing: Accurate DEM/DTM generation, point cloud classification, contours, GIS analytics

Consulting & visualization: Tailored data outputs for compliance, planning, and decision support

Name: DenAr Ocean Engineering Services SA
Description:
DenAr Ocean Engineering Services SA was founded in 2007 and its headquarter is in Istanbul. The core activity of Company is marine surveying. DenAr can conduct bathymetric, oceanographic, geological and geophysical surveys.

The other activities of DenAr is environmental monitoring, modeling and instrument sales and services.

DenAr conducts route surveys for communication and power companies for cable and pipeline laying and maintanance, hydrographic and ocenographic surveys for coastal engineering applications and power plants.

DenAr also establishes environmental monitoring systems to observe meteorology, hydrology, waves, tides, currents, chemical and physical properties of sea water and pollutants.

DenAr also provides sales and services of major oceanographic equipment manufacturers in Turkey.

Name: Surveyors UK
Description:
Surveyors UK

Because Surveying Matters

Surveyors UK is the home of The Surveying Room, the UK’s first independent community connecting surveyors of every discipline, career stage, and background.

At its heart is connection. The Surveying Room brings together surveyors, students, and industry professionals to share knowledge, ideas, and opportunities in a single trusted space. It’s free to join and open to everyone working in or alongside the profession.

Around the community sits a growing ecosystem designed to connect, promote, and elevate the industry:

Events and CPD – live sessions, webinars, and training from across the profession

Jobs and Careers – a smarter way for firms and talent to find each other

Products and Services Directory – discover trusted partners, tech, and suppliers

Lead Generation for Firms – helping surveyors and businesses grow their visibility

Mentoring and Collaboration – linking experience with fresh perspective

Referrals and Opportunities - because collaboration beats competition

Surveyors UK is independent of any single organisation or body. We work with the industry, not over it, partnering with associations, universities, and companies to create shared value and break down silos.

Whether you’re a student exploring surveying, a firm looking to grow, or a professional ready to connect, this is your space to belong.

Join us.

Name: Toknav Information Technology Co.Limited

Name: Scan to BIM Solutions
Description:
At Scan to BIM Solutions, we turn 3D laser scans into accurate 3D BIM Models for clients in the USA, Canada, and Europe. Our services are ideal for architects, engineers, construction teams, and building surveyors who need reliable models for their projects.

We convert 3D Laser Scanning Data into BIM models using software like Autodesk Recap Pro, Revit, Navisworks, and AutoCAD. Our models cover everything from the structure of the building to the mechanical, electrical, and plumbing (MEP) systems.

We use advanced tools and methods to process point cloud data, check for clashes, and verify the models to ensure they’re accurate. We work closely with you to understand what you need, so the final model is just right for your project. No matter the size or type of your project, we’re here to provide high-quality Scan to BIM services.

Our clients receive detailed BIM models that help with better planning, coordination, and reducing mistakes during construction or renovation. Whether you’re working on a new building, a retrofit, or managing an existing facility, our models give you the clear and accurate information you need.

Description:

Gesellschafter sind die Öffentlich bestellten Vermessungsingenieure Jörg Biermann, Sebastian Heldt und Matthias Roth.

Unser Tätigkeitsbereich ist die Durchführung von terrestrischen 3D-Laserscans und die Analyse und Weiter- verarbeitung der dabei gewonnenen Messdaten. Produkte sind sowohl die Scanpunktwolken selbst, als auch ver- schiedenste Bearbeitungsergebnisse wie zum Beispiel:
   
    - objekt- oder flächenbasierte 3D-Computermodelle in Form von  CAD- oder 3D-pdf-Dateien 
    - Grundriss-, Ansichts- oder Abwicklungspläne als CAD-Dateien, auf Papier oder auf archivsicheren Folien
     - maßstäbliche Messbilder 
     - Volumen-, Mengen- oder Maßermittlungen
     - geometrische Analysen wie Ebenheitsuntersuchungen, Kollisionsprüfungen
      - Soll-Ist-Vergleiche oder Verformungsmessungen
      - animierte 360-Grad-Fotopanoramen

Die Größe der Messobjekte kann von wenigen Millimetern bis zu mehreren Kilometern reichen. Die erzielbaren Messgenauigkeiten liegen je nach Objektgröße und Scansystem zwischen 0,001 mm und 3 cm.

Name: Havitar
Description:
Havitar was created to help people communicate in vivid 3D.  We work with owners, managers, public agencies, designers and other creative professionals to create 3D digital twins of interior and exterior areas to help with design, construction, sales, planning, surveying and storytelling.

Our principal, Doug Higgins, is a licensed Part 107 commerial drone pilot, real estate broker, entrepreneur, and experienced property developer and asset manager.  Havitar was created to address real problems he experienced in his 20 years in the corporate world including: finding a better way to communicate conceptual design concepts in three dimensions for owner approval; creating better workflows for construction sites (like punchlists that can be produced, tracked, and managed in three dimensions); helping hotels and resorts show potential guests and meeting planners how their event will look in an immersive environment; helping brokers help their clients visualize their future in any space; and creating measurable 3D models of places like model rooms that need to be measured and refined over time.  The first time he used photogrammetry to create a 3D model from drone footage, he drove down an endless rabbit hole that has resulted in an excuse to buy some of the coolest toys in the business including: a Matrice 300 RTK drone (for LiDAR and ultra-high resolution photography); a Mavic 3 Enterprise RTK drone (for fast and accurate 3D mapping and modelling missions; a Mavic 3 Cine drone (for cinema quality videography); a Canon r5c (for ultra high-resolution terrestrial photogrammetry); Leica BLK2GO and Leica BLK360gen2 high-resolution imaging LiDAR scanners (for collecting ground level LiDAR data that can be matched to aerial drone LiDAR data); spherical cameras; survey poles; RTK geolocation devices for the cameras; advanced computers; and many other accessories.  We are now stocked with the best available modern technology to help you scan, model, and tell your story.

Description:
Welkom bij Dutch Survey Solutions. Mijn naam is Mathias Wolthuis, de oprichter van DSS. Met meer dan 10 jaar ervaring als landmeter, maatvoerder en later ook als werkvoorbereider/project coordinator heb ik mij kunnen specialiseren in een breed scala aan disciplines binnen de maatvoering en landmeetkundige sector.

Deze disciplines omvatten o.a.
- Landmeting, topografische en revisiemetingen
- Maatvoering in de bouw, infra en rail sector
- CAD voorbereiding en verwerking van meetdata

In de wereld van de landmeetkunde, maatvoering en CAD-tekenwerk vormen duidelijkheid en nauwkeurigheid de kern van alles wat we doen. Het is van essentieel belang dat onze klanten en partners begrijpen wat onze uitzetgegevens en tekeningen vertegenwoordigen. Wanneer we metingen uitzetten, willen we dat elke lijn, elke piket en elke markering een duidelijk verhaal vertelt. Daarbij is goede communicatie over de verrichte werkzaamheden van groot belang. 

Nauwkeurigheid is even cruciaal, omdat zelfs de kleinste fouten aanzienlijke gevolgen kunnen hebben en kunnen leiden tot hoge kosten.

Bij Dutch Survey Solutions streven we voortdurend naar de hoogste normen van duidelijkheid en nauwkeurigheid. Elke meting, elke tekening en elk advies dat we verstrekken, is gebaseerd op deze kernprincipes, omdat we geloven dat duidelijkheid en nauwkeurigheid de sleutel zijn tot succes in onze branche."

Name: Geological Survey of Pakistan
Description: The Geological Survey of Pakistan (GSP) is an attached department of the Ministry of Energy (Petroleum Division), Government of Pakistan. It was established, at the time of independence in 1947, with only 5 Muslim geologists of the Geological Survey of India who opted for Pakistan. It is a national organization that, as per its charter, is primarily responsible for the collection and dissemination of geological information about the country so that the earth’s resources could be best exploited and utilized. The geological information is compiled and disseminated in the form of geological reports and maps. Geological maps provide a bird’s eye view of the surface (and subsurface) distribution of various types of rocks and economic minerals that are found in a particular region. These maps are, thus, essential for all future detailed geological works including, mineral exploration, civil engineering, soil surveys, land use, and soil conservation projects. Worldwide experience suggests that geological maps on a 1:50,000 scale provide the most useful information and meet the requirement of most of the demands.

Name: AERO2ASTRO DRONES

Aero2Astro is a full-stack aerial intelligence company helping infrastructure, energy, and government sectors make faster, safer, and data-driven decisions using drone-based geospatial solutions.

In the pre-construction phase, we conduct high-accuracy aerial surveys, terrain mapping, and environmental assessments to ensure optimal site selection and project feasibility. During the construction phase, our real-time progress monitoring and volumetric analysis help stakeholders stay on schedule, manage resources effectively, and ensure compliance with safety standards. For operations and maintenance, we deliver high-resolution inspections of critical assets such as solar panels, wind turbines, transmission lines, and industrial infrastructure to identify potential defects and optimize maintenance schedules through predictive analytics.  

Our expertise extends across a wide range of sectors, including roadways, railways, bridges, industrial facilities, and renewable energy projects such as solar farms and wind farms. Aero2Astro’s intelligent insights enable stakeholders to make data-driven decisions, mitigate risks, and maximize the lifespan and performance of their assets.  

We are committed to driving innovation and sustainability, empowering industries to transition toward renewable energy and more resilient infrastructure. Description:
The Nigerian Geological Survey Agency (NGSA) is a parastatal under the Ministry of Mines and Steel Development. The Agency has the statutory role of providing relevant and up-to-date geosciences information necessary for economic development of Nigeria. This is accomplished through a systematic process of gathering, collating, assessment and dissemination of all information related to rocks, minerals and groundwater resources of the country.
The Agency was established by Nigerian Geological Survey Establishment Act 2006. Its earliest precursor the Geological Survey of Nigeria (GSN), was set up in 1919 following the amalgamation of the Mineral Survey of Northern and Southern Nigeria in 1909 and 1913, respectively.

Name: Conquest Surveying & Geomatics
Description:
Are issues with unreliable survey data, incorrect ground elevations, or mismatched drawings causing you frustration?

Are you dealing with missing or misidentified underground utilities or control points lacking accurate values?

You’re not alone!  We have provided fully verified deliverables to engineers, architects, urban planners, consultants, contractors, developers, and landowners.

Top engineering firms and contractors rely on our data, knowing it sails through ADM design and approval stages smoothly, never needing comments or revisions.

Experience peace of mind with our accurate, reliable survey data. This is more than a deliverable; it adds lasting value to your project.
Our licensed surveying engineers ensure that every drawing (DWG, DXF) is thoroughly verified both on-site and in our office to meet the 2δ  accuracy standards with a 95% confidence level. 
Each drawing captures all site features and aligns with as-built conditions when overlaid. This attention to detail guarantees no design errors and no costly rework.

Don't let flawed survey data stress you out or stall design work, project approvals, and construction schedules; this can impede your project’s success.

For data collection special 3D Mapping Solutions survey systems with Cameras and Laser Scanners are used. The unique quality and accuracy of any data is a USP for 3D Mapping Solutions and guaranteed by a rigid quality management.
Currently, the focus is on providing high-end reference maps as basis for user specific developments and for advanced ADAS or autonomous driving development, testing and validation applications.  3D Mapping high-precision road surface models are used as basis for high-end simulators or simulation applications for all kinds of possible purposes in the field of virtual testing and virtual development. Therefore, 3D Mapping Solutions build the bridge between real world and digital imaging. High-precision as built-plans are exported in appropriate formats and thus tested and used directly for customer applications.

Name: Atlas of Switzerland
Description:
The Atlas of Switzerland, the official Swiss National Atlas, is available for free directly on our website. This interactive atlas features over 400 thematic maps covering a wide range of topics, from history and tourism to nature, and economy, and much more!
Originally initiated by the Swiss federal government in 1961, the atlas was published in print between 1965 and 1997, featuring around 600 maps. At the start of the 21st century, it transitioned to a digital format. The Atlas of Switzerland is now available directly in the browser, and it works on computers, tablets, and phones.
The Atlas of Switzerland offers stunning visualizations along with navigation and interactive tools. Each map is enriched with explanatory text, charts and images. While the primary focus is Switzerland, the atlas also includes thematic maps of Europe and the world.
Published by the Institute of Cartography and Geoinformation at ETH Zurich, the atlas is continuously improved and updated. Try it out and dive into the fascinating world of maps.

We leverage UAV platforms to operate our integrated technology payload, we deliver higher-resolution remote sensing solutions at a fraction of traditional costs and with increased speed.

Our technology and services make geophysical surveying more accessible to you.

So what is 3XMAG?
A cutting-edge aerial magnetometry service that is revolutionizing geophysical surveying in the mining, energy, and environmental monitoring industry.

How does 3XMAG work?
By integrating advanced UAV technology with state-of-the-art geophysics equipment into a streamlined geospatial surveying service.

What is 3XMAG Offering?
3XMAG enables all-size organizations and companies access to geospatial and geophysics experts and services with powerful tool to collect subsurface and magnetic data for exploration, resource assessment and specific industry applcations.

Fundada en abril de 1964 por el Ingeniero Técnico Agrícola D. José Mª Carulla Gratacós y con relevo generacional (Director Técnico D. Albert Carulla Riera y Gerente D. Francesc Carulla Riera), su presencia en las Baleares ha sido un referente constante en el sector cartográfico de Baleares.

Durante este periodo de tiempo se ha caracterizado por la drástica evolución tanto en los procedimientos tecnológicos empleados como en los resultados con ellos obtenidos; ESTOP S.A. ha demostrado ser un fiel exponente de adaptabilidad a las nuevas exigencias del mercado, lo que ha hecho que nuestra empresa un líder del sector tanto en tecnologías como en los procesos más avanzados, contando para ello con un equipo multidisciplinar de profesionales como Ingenieros, Topógrafos, Biólogos, Fotógrafos, Economistas, Comerciales, Escanistas, Diseñadores gráficos, Geólogos etc... altamente cualificados con una gran trayectoria y experiencia que garantizan el éxito de los resultados obtenidos hasta ahora; es por ello que contamos con prácticamente la totalidad de departamentos que intervienen en el conocimiento y gestión del territorio.

En sus orígenes ESTOP S.A. nació como una empresa dedicada casi y de forma exclusiva a trabajos de topografía; en 1968 pasó a ofertar un nuevo servicio de Fotografías Aéreas Verticales, en 1982 oferta los servicios de Fotografía Aérea Panorámica, en 1988 ofrece los servicios de realización de Estudios Medioambientales , en 1990 empieza con los servicios de fotografía terrestre industrial, 1995 incorpora SIG, en 1996 servicios de Publicidad Aérea, en 2002 Perspectivas 3D, infografía, en 2005 Estudios Geotécnicos y Geofísicos, en 2013 Fotografía y video aéreos con dron, en 2015 planos Georreferenciados - GML, en 2015 Fotogrametría de canteras y edificios, en 2017 realización de estados actuales de edificios y fachadas con Laser escaner.

Name: Surveying and Mapping Society Education Foundation (SAMSEF)
Description:
The SAMSOG Education Foundation (SAMSEF) was established by The Surveying and Mapping Society of GA (SAMSOG) to provide a tax-deductible mechanism for donations of money and other gifts to support education for the land surveying profession in GA. The SAMSOG Education Foundation is an approved 501c3 foundation and is directly managed by a board of trustees that are also members of the Surveying and Mapping Society of GA. Your contributions to the foundation are tax-deductible and will go directly to assist students and education programs related to land surveying in Georgia.

SAMSEF manages and operates the Ben W. Fortson scholarship for bachelor degree-seeking land surveying students throughout the state. With a balance of nearly $200,000.00, this scholarship fund has assisted well over 100 land surveying students with financial scholarships in recent years. The fund now supports one student per year with a $3,000.00 annual scholarship.

SAMSEF also operates five "flow-through" regional scholarships. These scholarships are supported by donations from companies and/or individuals throughout the state. Using these donations, the Foundation provides five $3,000.00 scholarships per year to degree seeking land surveying students that endeavor to have or further a career in land surveying.

SAMSEF also operates the SAMSEF Technical Scholarship, established to financially assist students pursuing education in the land surveying profession but are not enrolled in a formal associate's or bachelor's degree. This scholarship assists 3 students per semester with $500.00 scholarships and is funded each year by our annual SAMSEF raffle.  

SAMSEF also provides assistance to education programs throughout the state through financial and other types of donations.

The Foundation strives to assist the land surveying industry by publicizing the profession of land surveying to students and others that may be interested in starting a land surveying career.

Name: THE WATER SERVICES GROUP LTD
Description:
Our Underwater Engineering Services
The Water Services Group have been offering Underwater Engineering services since the early 80’s. Our underwater engineering company has been at the forefront of long-distance internal water pipe surveys, underwater pipe inspection services and testing and were the first engineering company to develop and operate a Water Pipe Inspection Vehicle.

As an experienced underwater engineering company, we design, build and operate bespoke pipe inspection vehicles to carry out remotely operated vehicle surveys (ROV) on a broad array of inspection and testing services from within pipes, where any other form of inspection or testing would be impossible to achieve.

With our Underwater Engineering services, we have inspected, tested, mapped, measured and surveyed underwater pipes, tunnels, aqueduct repairs, culverts, sewer pipes and long-sea outfall’s varying in diameter between 350mm – 6m, over distances in excess of 24km and in flow rates varying between static and 2.3 metres per second.

In September 2014, The Water Services Group designed and built the World’s first multi-camera pipe inspection vehicle to survey a 21km x 2.5m diameter water transfer tunnel accessed via 50-90m deep access shafts. This was to provide a full circumferential view of the pipe and to accurately measure deformation on profiling sonar.

This level of Client support from our underwater engineering services is only made possible by the combination of the talents of our forward thinking, multi-disciplined, dedicated team and excellent partnering companies that offer the range of services and the level of support that really makes a difference.

We are ISO 9001 accredited and have an unblemished safety record to ensure superior delivery of our services from sea outfall maintenance to aqueduct repairs

The Water Services Group have a wide range of experience ranging in a variety water pipe inspection services from large culvert surveys to aqueduct repair.

Name: Sokil
Description:
Sokil is a Ukrainian technology company developing modular UAV-based magnetometer systems for humanitarian demining. We combine advanced engineering, data analysis, and user-friendly design to make mine detection safer, faster, and more affordable.

Our mission is to support Ukraine’s recovery and contribute to global humanitarian demining efforts by providing accessible tools that complement existing technologies in the field. Sokil’s modular system enables rapid aerial surveying of up to 1.2 hectares per hour, helping operators collect high-precision magnetic data while minimizing risk to people on the ground.

With a focus on cost efficiency, scalability, and ease of use, our solution is up to 10x more affordable than traditional systems, offering annual savings of up to $30,000 per operation. Combined with our integrated planning and analysis software, Sokil enables faster decision-making and more efficient field operations.

We collaborate with humanitarian organizations, technology partners, and research institutions to expand the use of drone-based surveying and make the demining process more accessible worldwide.

Our team believe that technology should serve people and safety. By bridging the gap between innovation and practical application, we want to help rebuild safer communities and restore land for agriculture, infrastructure, and life.

Name: Przyjazny Audyt
Description:
PrzyjaznyAudyt to firma zajmująca się profesjonalnym przygotowywaniem certyfikatów energetycznych niezbędnych przy wynajmie oraz sprzedaży nieruchomości. Cały proces prowadzony jest online, dzięki czemu jest szybki, wygodny i nie wymaga wychodzenia z domu.

Aby zamówić certyfikat energetyczny, wystarczy wypełnić formularz na stronie internetowej firmy. W formularzu należy podać wymagane informacje o nieruchomości, takie jak adres, powierzchnia użytkowa, liczba pomieszczeń i rok budowy itd. Po złożeniu i opłaceniu zamówienia nasz pracownik przystąpi do analizy przesłanych informacji i zdjęć. W terminie od 2 do 5 dni roboczych certyfikat zostanie przygotowany i wysłany na wskazany adres email.

PrzyjaznyAudyt to gwarancja profesjonalnego wykonania usługi w szybkim terminie. Firma posiada wszystkie niezbędne uprawnienia do sporządzania certyfikatów energetycznych. Klienci firmy mogą liczyć na fachową pomoc i doradztwo w zakresie energetyki budynkowej.

Oto kilka korzyści z posiadania certyfikatu energetycznego:

* Zwiększenie atrakcyjności nieruchomości na rynku najmu i sprzedaży
* Oszczędność energii i pieniędzy na rachunkach za prąd
* Poprawa komfortu użytkowania nieruchomości
* Zmniejszenie emisji zanieczyszczeń do środowiska

Jeśli planujesz wynająć lub sprzedać nieruchomość, zachęcamy do skorzystania z usług firmy PrzyjaznyAudyt. 

Certyfikat energetyczny to inwestycja, która szybko się zwróci.

Name: AIRBORNE GEOSCIENCES INTERNATIONAL PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
INTRODUCTION:
Airborne Geoscience International (AGI) is an Indian startup mandated to become India’s first full service early-stage natural resource exploration company. Developed by two pioneering entrepreneurs, Sudipto Mukerji (www.alcockgroup.com) and Captain Anirudh Tanwar, (www.saarthiairways.com)
Eary stage exploration of subsurface natural resources (base and precious metals, critical minerals, hydrocarbons, kimberlites (diamonds), rare earth elements, underground water, geothermal sources etc) involves application of a wide range of airborne and ground technologies over large unexplored acreage, with the aim to identify and establish the discoveries of deep seated natural resource deposits, in the most comprehensive, time efficient and cost effective manner.  
Geologically speaking, India rivals the mineral potentials of Western Australia and Eastern Africa. In spite of the same, India’s contribution to the global mining investment & production is practically negligible. As part of India’s “Viksit Bharat 2047”mission, it is imperative that the natural resources sector becomes a significant contributor to the country’s GDP. Aside from the country’s overall development, the quantum jump of India’s natural resource exploration sector is critical from India’s geopolitical, carbon transition and energy security perspectives as well. 
Given the above background, AGI is in the process of developing early stage exploration infrastructure in India, which will form the bedrock for India’s “Atmanirbhar Exploration” of critical and deep seated natural resources. Development of such infrastructure includes, but is not limited to, development and/or application of state-of-the-art, exclusive and patented survey technologies, survey aircraft and equipment, suitably qualified human resources, early stage exploration consulting, data management including data analysis etc in India, with a goal to make India the largest global exploration hotspot of the future.

Name: WingMan Photogrammetry
Description: WingMan is by your side to help with your image processing needs. With 25 years of experience in photogrammetry and remote sensing you can be assured in accuracy and any problems are taken care of. WingMan acquires the imagery collected from a UAV or Aerial platforms using medium to large format sensors.  Triangulation is then run from a WingMan photogrammetrist to create the project files necessary for value added products like a seamless color balanced orthomosaic. It's important to mention the orthorectified images are first output as separate files and not simply merged into a DSM, mesh, or mosaic file. This allows for more accurate seamline placement around (not through) buildings and utility towers. Furthermore, vignetting and color balancing can be accounted for or eliminated before the final mosaic is processed. These darker fringes of the image area, (vignetting) inherent with Imagery collection can be cropped (using the meat of the image data) or hotspot mitigated for a more homogenous mosaic, not simply blended/feathered incorrectly. The triangulated project files can also be used to create other value-added products like capturing breaklines in a stereo environment for accurate ground DTM and planimetrics.

Name: APS SURVEY & MAPPING INC
Description: APS Survey & Mapping, a nationally recognized  firm, has been acquired by land surveying executives, Val Ward.  Val purchased the 20 year old firm and merged it with her North Bend surveying firm, Direct Surveying. The new entity will keep the APS Survey & Mapping name and merge Direct Surveying employees & assets into APS. “We are excited about the new entity created by the merger of Direct Surveying and APS”, said APS President Ward. “APS has long been recognized as a national leader in land surveying. Their expertise, combined with the 50 plus years’ experience and client first approach of the Direct Surveying team, will prove invaluable to our existing and new clients.” APS has a broad and varied professional resume throughout the Northwest. “I am delighted to remain part of the new APS team and look forward to many exciting opportunities,” said Tyler Sweet, previous owner of APS. Sweet has been recognized by numerous land surveying professional organizations, trade publications and clients for his contributions and participation in land surveying. His career began in 1971 in AK and continued in WA, OR, ID, MO and the Pacific Coast. “Tyler is a true legend in our industry,” said Ms. Ward. “His experience combined with Sam’s technical skills are tremendous and will serve as a great resource for our staff and clients.” Sam Ward, a Certified State and Federal Surveyor, who will serve as Principal Surveyor of the new APS, spearheaded much of Direct Surveying’s exponential growth. Ward sees the value of the new combined forces. “With the addition of the APS staff and assets, we will now have the extended resources to not only continue our unsurpassed return client relationships, but also accelerate our growth and expand our client portfolio,” Ward said. APS is a certified as a Woman Owned Small Business (WOSB).

Name: Mijn Erfgrens
Description:
Te vaak zien we dat men het belang van de nauwkeurigheid van erfgrenzen onderschat. 

Vaak wordt ten onrechte aangenomen dat fysieke barrières zoals een schutting, raster of een haag de werkelijke erfgrens aangeven, terwijl dit vaak niet het geval is. We vertrouwen te veel op de gegevens van het kadaster of zijn ons simpelweg niet bewust van de gevolgen van onnauwkeurige en onduidelijke erfgrenzen.

Onwetendheid over de precieze erfgrens kan leiden tot vervelende problemen, zoals juridische geschillen met buren, verlies van eigendomsrechten, vertraging bij bouwprojecten of problemen bij de aankoop of verkoop van een woning.

Met meer dan 25 jaar ervaring als onderdeel van LBA Achterhoek, weten wij precies hoe we elke meting efficiënt en nauwkeurig kunnen uitvoeren. Met onze diensten: grensreconstructie en kavelsplitsing vooraf zetten wij de grens, zodat jij kunt bouwen op vertrouwen en zekerheid.

Yetkilendirilmiş Tüzel Kişiler (YTK), Maden Danışmanlığı, Jeolojik – Hidrojeolojik Etüt, Sondaj, Harita ve 3 Boyutlu Modelleme ile Mühendislik Hizmetleri, Çevresel Etki Değerlendirme (ÇED), Çevre Danışmanlığı, İş Sağlığı ve Güvenliği konularında hizmetler vermekteyiz. Madencilik faaliyetleriniz için gerekli olan tüm resmi işlemler ve ileri teknoloji (jeoteknik, jeofizik, sondaj, 3D modelleme) ile rezerv ve değer tespiti çalışmalarını yaparak, yatırımızın uygulanabilirliğini en doğru şekilde sunmaktayız. Biz, bünyesinde jeoloji, maden, çevre, harita mühendisleri ve çeşitli disiplinlerden oluşan tecrübeli uzman kadrosu ile Türkiye’nin önde gelen Mühendislik - Müşavirlik firması, ‘’Güvenilir Yol Arkadaşı’’ olma hedefinde emin adımlarla ilerlemekteyiz. Kaliteli, verimli ve kazanç odaklı hizmetler sunmak, büyüme ivmenizi arttırırken karşınıza çıkabilecek zorlukları kaldırmak için, en güncel teknolojiden faydalanarak profesyonel, eğitimli, yüksek motivasyon sahibi ekibimiz ile çalışmaktayız. FİDES MÜHENDİSLİK, çalışma alanlarında hızlı ve sabırlı, doğru ve uygulanabilir çözümler üreterek, kanunlara, yönetmeliklere, ticari etiklere uygun davranarak; çağdaş, kaliteli ve sağlıklı bir hizmet anlayışı geliştirerek; “Güvenilir Yol Arkadaşı” olarak bu sektörde daima sizin yanınızda olacaktır.

Name: SnapRoad
Description:
SnapRoad exists because driving has quietly become one of the most stressful parts of daily life.

For drivers, the road no longer feels simple. Navigation apps track everything, push distractions, and treat people like data points instead of humans. Safety feels reactive, not supportive. Trust is thin. Control is gone.

For local businesses, visibility has become expensive and unfair. Large platforms extract fees, gate customer access, and offer little loyalty in return. Small businesses are forced to compete in systems that weren’t built for them.

SnapRoad was created to change that dynamic.

We are building a privacy-first navigation and rewards ecosystem designed around human well-being, trust, and community value. Our platform helps drivers feel safer, more respected, and more in control every time they’re on the road. At the same time, we give local businesses a fair way to connect with nearby customers without being buried under ads or excessive fees.

At its core, SnapRoad believes:
	•	drivers deserve guidance, not surveillance
	•	communities should protect each other, not exploit attention
	•	local businesses should be supported, not squeezed

We’re not trying to make driving louder or more addictive.
We’re making it calmer, safer, and more rewarding.

SnapRoad grows intentionally, starting with real value, then expanding as trust is earned. Every decision we make is guided by one principle:

If it doesn’t make life better for the people using it, we don’t build it.

Name: Geoconsult
Description:
At Geoconsult, we stand at the forefront of technological innovation, combining revolutionary advancements in cloud storage, artificial intelligence (AI), and machine learning (ML) with robust internet connectivity to transform the landscape of offshore geophysical data management. Our expertise lies in seamlessly integrating these cutting-edge technologies to enhance quality checks and streamline data processing procedures for offshore geophysical data, ensuring the highest standards of precision and reliability.

With over 20 years of unparalleled experience in nearshore surveys, we bring a wealth of knowledge and expertise to every project. Our extensive background enables us to expertly navigate the complexities of nearshore environments, significantly mitigating data quality risks that can critically impact the engineering and construction phases of landfall areas. This proficiency is particularly vital for Oil and Gas companies and cable-laying operations, where precise data is crucial for successful project execution.

Our comprehensive approach leverages the power of cloud storage to provide scalable, secure, and accessible data solutions. AI and ML technologies are at the core of our operations, enabling advanced data analytics and predictive modeling that enhance decision-making processes and optimize survey outcomes. Coupled with high-speed internet connectivity, we ensure real-time data transfer and analysis, facilitating swift and informed responses to emerging challenges.

At Geoconsult, our mission is to lead the industry in delivering exceptional data quality and operational excellence. By harnessing the synergy of technology and experience, we provide our clients with the confidence and assurance needed to undertake complex projects in nearshore and onshore environments. Our commitment to innovation and quality drives us to continually push the boundaries, setting new standards in geophysical data management for  Oil and Gas and renewables.

Name: GIX Consulting Ltd
Description:
Our team specializes in the use of LiDAR, optical, and hyperspectral sensors for surveying and data collection across varied environments:

LiDAR: Generates three-dimensional data, primarily used in infrastructure surveying and monitoring.

Optical Imaging: Captures detailed images across different terrains, from forests to open fields.

Hyperspectral Imaging: Collects information over a range of light wavelengths, aiding in material identification based on spectral properties.

In Forestry, our data processing services encompass tree counting, species classification, biomass and carbon estimation, and specific metric extraction such as tree height and canopy area.

Environmental applications involve calculations related to surface runoff, topographic wetness indices, water quality measurements, and the identification of areas like collapsed mine subsidence.

In the Agricultural sector, our work includes hedge mapping, NDVI analysis, crop and woodland monitoring, soil health assessment, and pest detection using drone data.

For Infrastructure, we focus on detailed surveying and monitoring tasks.

While drones are the primary medium for our data collection, satellite data is integrated when the project requires a broader perspective.

We maintain an openness to collaboration and consultancy, especially for projects or industries beyond the ones mentioned. Should you have requirements outside of these domains, please reach out, and we'll explore how our expertise might align with your needs.

We deliver a full suite of geospatial services, including high-resolution aerial imagery, lidar, and magnetometry; manned and unmanned based topographic mapping; geodetic and project control surveys; volumetric analysis; and as-built documentation for construction and infrastructure projects. Our workflows integrate aerial and ground-based data to produce reliable, survey-grade deliverables that support engineering, planning, and operational decision making.

Great Basin Geomatics specializes in the mining sector, supporting exploration, development, active operations, and reclamation projects. Name: Blue Rock Flood Services
Description:
BRFS determines if a structure qualifies for FEMA-mandated flood insurance and, when possible, identifies options to reduce premiums or remove the insurance requirements altogether. 

Automated FZDs will have more errors particularly in rural and agricultural areas. 
At BRFS, each map is individually reviewed by an expert, and we have had ZERO errors resulting in a claim filed against our E&O policy.

WHO WE SERVE: 
Banks, credit unions, mortgage companies, title companies, real estate professionals, insurance companies, and individual property owners.

WHAT WE OFFER: 
For financial sector clients, we provide standard flood zone determinations services, but done using aerial images and GIS software for greater precision than automated determinations.

And interestingly in Ternow, we believe "Impossible is impossible until someone does it!".

Ternow has been founded by graduates of the Technical University of Munich. We are partnered with the European Space Agency (ESA) via the ESA-BIC accelerator program and the university of Bundeswehr. We are also honored to get support from the brilliant minds from UnternehmerTUM and TUM Venture Labs. 

If you like to push boundaries, define new normal, think radically and out-of-the-box with no border, challenge believed impossibilities, Ternow is the right place for you. If you decide to join Ternow, we welcome you with open arms. Just make sure you are good at swimming, because quit often, we swim in the opposite direction!

Our Expertise

 LiDAR & Digital Terrain Modeling (DTM): High-precision LiDAR surveys for accurate elevation data, even in dense vegetation.

Datainsamling sker genom undersökningar, som kvantitativa enkäter eller kvalitativa djupintervjuer, direkt observation, eller insamling från sekundära datakällor som offentlig statistik eller organisationers egna data. Vi organiserar data till information genom analys, vilket kan innebära grafisk visualisering, stokastiska metoder, eller AI-modellering. Genom att kombinera informationen med kontext och expertis skapar vi insikter som hjälper organisationer att ta strategiska beslut om sin verksamhet och kommunikation. 

Aura Insight är en av del av Aura Group, en av Nordens största kommunikationskoncerner. Vi är drygt 500 medarbetare fördelat på 9 byråer. Tillsammans hjälps vi åt att lyfta varandra och våra kunder.

Name: Skyfleet Solutions LLP
Description:
SkyFleet Solutions provides survey grade drone LiDAR, photogrammetry, and bathymetric mapping for engineering, construction, utilities, and land development projects across Iowa and the Midwest.

We specialize in capturing high-accuracy aerial and water-based data and delivering it in formats that can be used immediately inside Civil 3D, MicroStation, and other CAD platforms. Our workflows are built around real-world engineering and construction needs not just flying drones.

SkyFleet delivers:
• Drone LiDAR for vegetation, corridors, and terrain
• Photogrammetry accurate to the hundredths of a foot
• Bathymetric surveys using drone boats and sonar
• CAD-ready surfaces and breaklines
• High-resolution aerial mapping
• Cut & fill and volume reporting
• Online 3D data sharing

We use survey-grade GNSS control, professional processing, and strict QA/QC to ensure our data is reliable on soft ground, construction sites, vegetated areas, and water crossings where traditional methods are slow, expensive, or unsafe.

SkyFleet Solutions was founded in 2022 by Gage Uhlman and Devin Hartpence to bring engineering-grade drone data to modern infrastructure projects.

Whether you need drone surveying in Iowa, LiDAR through dense vegetation, bathymetric mapping, or construction site monitoring, SkyFleet delivers fast, accurate data you can design and build from.

We are in every sense market leaders in our field.

Name: GeoTersus
Description:
Dobro došli na zvaničnu #linkedin stranicu GeoTersus zastupništva za Bosnu i Hercegovinu, Hrvatski i Sloveniju!
Tersus GNSS je globalno priznat proizvođač geodetskih uređaja koji je poznat po svojoj izvanrednoj preciznosti, pouzdanosti i jednostavnosti korištenja. Njihovi proizvodi omogućavaju korisnicima da postignu visoku preciznost pozicioniranja u svim uvjetima, uključujući urbanu sredinu, šumska područja i otvorene prostore. Bez obzira na vaše specifične potrebe, Geogis Studio vam nudi širok spektar Tersus GNSS uređaja koji će vam pomoći da postignete iznimne rezultate.
Pored prodaje geodetskih uređaja i dodatne opreme, Geogis Studio pruža i niz dodatnih usluga kako bi podržao svoje klijente. Naš tim stručnjaka pruža tehničku podršku, obuku i savjetovanje kako biste maksimalno iskoristili vaš Tersus GNSS uređaj. Servis uređaja je obezbjeđen u Bosni i Hercegovini kao i Evropi sa glavnim sjedištem u Holandiji. Također smo specijalizirani za integraciju geodetske opreme u postojeće procese i softverske sustave, kako bismo vam omogućili jednostavno i učinkovito korištenje tehnologije.
Kvaliteta naših proizvoda i usluga, zajedno s posvećenošću prema klijentima, čini Geogis Studio partnerom od povjerenja za sve vaše geodetske potrebe. Uvijek smo spremni pružiti podršku i rješenja koja će vam pomoći.
Location: Novo Sarajevo, Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina

Name: HexCam
Description:

We specialise in survey and mapping as well as the generation of high accuracy 3D digital twins for remote inspection of assets. We have visual, LiDAR, thermal and multi-spectral payloads at our disposal.

Name: UCT Geomatics
Description:
Geomatics is an applied science and a professional discipline. As an applied science it involves an integrated approach to the measurement, analysis, management, and display of geographic and other spatial data. As a professional discipline, geomaticians have specialist skills, knowledge, and understanding in order to provide services that meet the needs of society and contribute to social and political stability, quality of life and the management of natural heritage and resources. 
Geomatics professionals may be involved in designing, conducting and managing activities relating to surveying, geography, geospatial information systems, land development and planning, land law and geospatial commerce.  We use the latest satellite, laser, acoustic, machine learning, artificial intelligence, big data, and information technologies and are continually branching into new challenging areas of specialisation.
Our 4-year undergraduate BSc in Geomatics is endorsed by the South African Geomatics Council and graduates can go on to become Professional Land Surveyors, Geoinformation Scientists, or Engineering Surveyors... or use their skills in the career of their own choosing!
We also offer Masters and PhD by research.
Come and join our energetic and enthusiastic student body!

As built verification

Clash detection and interference checking
Detailed topgraphical information

Piping and mechanical
Volume calculations

Name: Vermessungsbüro Wolfert
Description:
Die Vermessungsbüro Wolfert GmbH wurde im Jahr 1998 durch Dipl. Ing. Kurt Wolfert in der Kraichgaustraße in Meckesheim gegründet.
Nach kurzer Einarbeitungszeit wurde es 1999 notwendig zusätzliche Unterstützung einzustellen, sodass 2003 ein Umzug in die Horrenberger Straße unumgänglich wurde.

Die stetige Weiterentwicklung des Unternehmens veranlasste Herrn Wolfert, im Zeitraum von 2003 bis 2009, die Anzahl der Mitarbeiter kontinuierlich zu erhöhen. 2009 wurden schließlich auch diese Räumlichkeiten zu klein und man zog in das jetzige Firmengebäude in der Daimlerstraße 8 in Meckesheim.

2012 fiel die Entscheidung, die Abteilungen in drei eigenständige Gesellschaften zu unterteilen:

• Vermessungstechnik Wolfert GmbH
• GIS & EDV Wolfert GmbH
• Streetguard GmbH

So wurde gewährleistet, dass weiterhin auf die individuellen Wünsche der Kunden eingegangen werden kann und eine zeitnahe Bearbeitung der Daten möglich ist.

Aufgrund unseres vielseitigen Angebotes und der Ergebnisse in guter Qualität ist ein stetiger Anstieg von Personal zu verbuchen, um den Ansprüchen unserer Kunden gerecht zu werden.
Aktuell kümmern sich über 35 Mitarbeiter um Ihre Wünsche und Belange.

Die Gesellschaften sind nicht nur für ihre Innovation und Kreativität, sondern auch die Entwicklung von revolutionären Patenten, die auf den Markt gebracht worden sind, bekannt.

Name: Dronify MY
Description:
Revolutionizing Precision Data for Modern Infrastructure and Resource Management

In an era demanding greater efficiency, safety, and accuracy, traditional surveying methods often fall short, burdened by time-consuming processes, human error, and prohibitive costs. Many companies still grapple with manual data collection and ground-based surveying, limiting their ability to make agile, informed decisions and integrate into modern digital workflows. Accessing hazardous or expansive areas for data collection poses significant safety risks and operational challenges, while the extensive manpower, resources, and time required for conventional surveys inflate project expenses.

Dronify emerges as the essential solution, transforming how industries acquire, analyze, and leverage geospatial data. We specialize in advanced drone mapping and aerial data acquisition, providing a powerful alternative that radically improves safety, accelerates timelines, and drastically reduces costs for a diverse range of critical projects.

Unlocking Unprecedented Efficiency and Precision

Dronify addresses the core inefficiencies of traditional methods head-on. By leveraging cutting-edge drone technology piloted by CAAM (Civil Aviation Authority Malaysia) certified experts with a decade of field experience, we deliver precision data with unparalleled speed and accuracy. Our deep expertise in photogrammetry software and meticulous Ground Control Point (GCP) integration ensures centimeter-level accuracy in all our outputs. We don't just collect data; we transform it into actionable intelligence.

Our comprehensive suite of deliverables includes:

High-density 3D Point Cloud data for immersive virtual recreation and detailed analysis.
Robust 3D Mesh Models and high-resolution Orthomosaic Maps offering full-color digital twins of target areas.
Detailed Digital Surface Models (DSM), Digital Terrain Models (DTM), and precise Contour Maps for in-depth topographical understanding.
Seamless

Name: Youthmappers at RU
Description:
Hello everyone, YouthMappers is a global network of university-based chapters that use open mapping to help their communities. The organization was launched in 2015 by the U.S. Agency for International Development (USAID) and is now a consortium of over 220 chapters in more than 50 countries.
The YouthMappers program aims to empower young people with the skills and tools to create maps that can be used to support disaster response, public health initiatives, and other community development projects. Through their participation in YouthMappers, students gain hands-on experience in geographic information systems (GIS) and other mapping technologies, while also contributing to humanitarian efforts around the world.
The organization has also partnered with other institutions and organizations to create mapathon events, which bring together hundreds or thousands of mappers to collectively map areas that are lacking adequate mapping data. These mapathons have helped to support disaster response efforts, public health initiatives, and conservation projects.

Name: Atlas Aves UF
Description:
Altas Aves UF är ett ungdomsföretag grundat av fem gymnasieungdomar från Hitachigymnasiet Västerås. 

Atlas Aves produkter är för nuläget en karta eller en 3D-modell. 3D-modellerna skapas genom vårt skräddarsydda AI-baserade dataprogram där vi matar in videofiler i programmet. Programmet tar genom fotogrammetri och markerar ut punkter i terrängen, jämför flera videofiler och kompilerar samman dem i en enda 3D-modell. I en dator kan man utforska 3D-miljön som är skalenlig och nästan identisk skogen videorna togs i och här framställs vår andra produkt, kartorna. Kartor skapas genom modellerna där man använder modellens texturer och färger för att markera ut objekt såsom stenar, mossor, och undervegetation.

I framtiden När vi ombildar från UF till AB kommer vi att utvidga vår verksamhet till både Skogsindustrin och elindustrin, kanske till och med större! Vi har planer på att både göra skogsinventeringar och inspektioner av kraftnät.

 Följ vår resa både under UF-året och vidare som AB När vi tänker utanför kartan!

Name: Blue Nose Aerial Imaging of Memphis
Description:
Blue Nose Aerial Imaging of Memphis provides our clients with a full-scale aerial imagery solution.  From simple roof inspections to complex orthomosaic and 3D modeling, Blue Nose of Memphis is here for you and your clients.  
**Now Level 1 Thermography Certified**

Utilizing the DJI Mavic 3 Enterprise, we can efficiently map/photograph any size project with centimeter accuracy and resolution.  The Mavic 3E has one of the best visible spectrum cameras in the market along with RTK abilities to help create deliverables where you or your customers can make accurate detailed measurements without ever having to go to the job site.  Blue Nose Aerial of Memphis can also create accurate 3D models and point clouds of nearly any object to allow you or your client to make design decisions without having to question or guess.  Use these detailed 3D images to create a 3D print to create a physical landscape!

**Visible imagery is not our only specialty!  Blue Nose of Memphis can also help farmers keep track of their crops using AI to analyze the health of plants.  We have access to thermal imaging as well as the *NEW* multi-spectral drones.  The multi-spectral drone helps farmers analyze plants, soil, and erosion with the help of AI to help farmers make informed decisions to increase productivity and crop yield!** 

Blue Nose Aerial Imaging of Memphis is part of a larger team of US Veterans, current military, airline pilots, and air traffic controllers that have offices all over the United States.  The owner of this branch has been involved with aviation since the early 2000's and is currently an Air Traffic Controller as well as a commercially rated pilot and commercially rated drone pilot.  We value safety of people and property and strive to conduct business that never compromises safety. 

We thank you for your time checking us out and we look forward to serving you and helping you come up with solutions to your aerial imagery needs!

Name: 3D Digital Scanning Limited
Description:
3D Digital Scanning Limited offers 3D Laser Scanning, also known as Digital Twins to buildings and facilities managers dealing with commercial and public sector built environment. 

3D Laser Scanning offers building and facility managers a highly accurate and fast exact replication of a building, a specific part such as a production line or project, at a fraction of the cost of a traditional manual survey. 

The digital twin created allows for an immersive walkthrough of a building along with 2D and 3D birds eye view plans being created. 
This is achieved by scanning approximately 1.5 million data points every scan ( an average building may 200 scans) and merging this with 3D and 360 photography. 

The result is true depth perception, the ability to magnify exact details in a building and to measure to ~98% accuracy virtually as well as having 'as-is' plans for all compliance needs such as fire, legionella etc. 

Our mission at 3D Digital Scanning Limited is to offer latest technology in a  no-frills and cost-effective manner. Everything you need, nothing you don't at an affordable price. Something you can easily get value from immediately. 

Use cases are highlighted at www.3ddsl.com where various businesses, after receiving their 3D replicas where quickly able to put these plans to use. 

Now building and facility managers are able to, many for 1st time, have up to date plans accurately identifying the current configuration of buildings and the current condition of buildings without having to be on-site or having a full manual survey done of the site. This is crucial for building managers looking after several buildings. 

Because of the low cost now it is possible to instruct surveys regularly for both compliance needs and monitoring changing condition. 

With tighter budgets having to stretch further more accurate scope of works for 3rd party works can be given and areas of high priority can be dealt with against regular scheduled repair and maintenance.

I campi d’attività principali sono le misurazioni catastali, la tenuta a giorno, i rinnovi catastali e le nuove misurazioni, le misurazioni in genere e le bonifiche fondiarie, in particolare i raggruppamenti terreni, e in generale la gestione informatica del territorio.

Tutti gli operati sono trattati numericamente. Lo studio Riccardo Calastri GR SA opera sui comuni di Buseno, Mesocco e Soazza.

Negli ultimi anni sono stati intrapresi diversi sforzi per potenziare le nostre attività, sia con l’assunzione di specialisti, sia ammodernandoci con nuovi strumenti di misura e di elaborazione calcoli.  Gli investimenti per seguire l’evoluzione nel campo delle misurazioni sono stati notevoli: sia nella raccolta dati tramite strumenti moderni e con precisioni elevate che software per l'elaborazione dei dati e di calcolo.

Name: Babolin - Strumenti di misura
Description:
Da oltre 40 anni affianchiamo professionisti e imprese con vendita, noleggio e assistenza di strumenti di misura e con un servizio di rilievo 3D con operatore che consegna subito il DXF pronto per l’uso. Riduciamo tempi, rilavorazioni e costi, portando il cantiere direttamente nel CAD/CAM.

Il rilievo con operatore

Il nostro rilievo 3D acquisisce in campo dati precisi, trasformandoli in file digitali immediatamente utilizzabili.
Grazie a tecnologie avanzate garantiamo digitalizzazione affidabile e veloce.
• File immediati: DXF consegnato a fine rilievo, altri formati su richiesta.
• Modellazione 3D: modelli digitali per progettazione, refitting e riproduzioni.
• Versatilità: dal singolo ambiente a spazi complessi, sempre con la stessa precisione.

Settori serviti

Il metodo trova applicazione in vari contesti con identica esigenza di affidabilità:
• Navale: rilievi interni ed esterni per arredamento, refitting e nuove costruzioni.
• Arredo su misura e architettura: dati pronti per CAD/CAM e BIM.
• Marmo, legno, vetro: produzioni personalizzate ad alta precisione.
• Industria: sicurezza cantieri, posizionamento macchine, allineamenti e controlli.

Cosa offriamo

• Rilievo con operatore: acquisizione, verifica qualità e consegna immediata.
• Vendita e noleggio di strumenti selezionati per precisione e continuità operativa.
• Assistenza completa: calibrazioni, manutenzioni, riparazioni e formazione.
• Comfort Ambientale: diagnosi strumentali (termografia, datalogger, misure) e soluzioni mirate come VMC e isolamento termico.

Come lavoriamo

Brief tecnico → rilievo in campo → controllo dati → consegna file → supporto all’integrazione nei flussi CAD/CAM o BIM.

Copertura e supporto

Operiamo in tutta Italia con tempi rapidi, offriamo supporto remoto, demo e prove sul campo. Dall’analisi iniziale alla messa in produzione, un unico referente per strumenti, dati e competenza.

Name: Ace High Drone Specialists Ltd
Description:
Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) have revolutionised the way we collect data in a manner that is cost-effective, efficient and safer than other methods. We are one of the leading UAV companies with permission to undertake flights both day or night and within built-up areas.

UAVs provide a multitude of options including but not limited to LiDAR, Thermal Imaging, and Photogrammetry to name a few. Many industries including construction, emergency services, agriculture, and utilities enjoy huge benefits from the use of drones. By deploying a drone equipped with a LiDAR sensor, for example, you can get accurate aerial readings to create 3D models with centimetre-level accuracy and detect features that would be invisible to less sophisticated methods. 

Filming a construction site is a way of keeping a video diary of progress made. This is especially useful if you are based abroad, or in another part of the country. It’s also invaluable for monitoring and ensuring health and safety measures are consistently installed and adhered to. Stakeholders are often unable to visit sites, and videography allows all parties involved to follow the progress of the construction.

When a disaster or incident threatens lives and livelihoods, emergency responders require fast / live information enabling them to make the most informed decisions. Our UAVs with Thermal Imaging can provide situational awareness over a large area at pace. A reduced number of ground rescue personnel are required, so less operatives are exposed to the associated Health and Safety Risks while Fast Tracking the search task. UAV’s with Thermal Imagery are paving the way for faster response times while reducing costs.

WE PROVIDE

    Search for suspects and missing persons

    Accident or crime scene investigation imagery

    Search and recovery mission

    Disaster & emergency analysis

    High-resolution imagery and reporting for a

Our services are both agile and versatile from setup to delivery.

Name: The Survey School
Description:
For too long, the land surveying and geospatial industry has faced a critical challenge: a lack of accessible, modern training resources. Aspiring professionals often find themselves caught between theoretical academic programs and the immediate, practical demands of the job site, with few places to turn for guidance.

The Survey School is here to bridge that gap.

We are a comprehensive workforce development platform dedicated to empowering the next generation of surveyors. While we support licensure, our primary focus is moving beyond standard test preparation to teach the real-world skills that build careers and sustain our industry.

Our Mission To provide high-quality, accessible education that equips individuals with the practical knowledge and technical proficiency needed to thrive in a modern geospatial career.

What We Deliver:

- Workforce Development: Practical instruction in boundary law, geodesy, and field procedures that translates directly to job performance and career advancement.
- Modern Tech Stack: In-depth training on the tools driving the industry forward, including UAV/Drone photogrammetry, LiDAR workflows, AutoCAD Civil 3D, and GNSS/RTK methodology.
- Community & Mentorship: A collaborative ecosystem where professionals can find the resources they have been searching for, share knowledge, and navigate their career paths together.

Whether you are looking to enter the profession, upskill with the latest technology, or train your team, The Survey School is your partner in professional growth.

Name: Alban&Co Studio
Description:
Alban&Co Studio u themelua në vitin 2001 me një vizion të qartë për të ofruar shërbime të shkëlqyera në tregun imobiliar dhe në fushën e topografisë. Me një eksperiencë të gjatë dhe një ekip profesionistësh të përkushtuar, ne jemi të angazhuar për të ndihmuar klientët tanë të arrijnë objektivat e tyre me sukses dhe efikasitet.

Alban&Co Studio është e specializuar në ofrimin e shërbimeve të sakta dhe të detajuara topografike për klientët tanë. Ne kryejmë matje topografike, hartografi, dhe analiza gjeohapësinore për të ndihmuar në planifikimin dhe zhvillimin e projekteve të ndryshme. Teknologjia e avancuar dhe stafi ynë garantojnë që çdo projekt të përmbushë standardet më të larta të saktësisë dhe profesionalizmit.

Në tregun imobiliar, Alban&Co Studio ofron një gamë të gjerë shërbimesh për blerësit, shitësit dhe investitorët. Ne ofrojmë konsulencë profesionale për të ndihmuar klientët tanë të bëjnë zgjedhjet më të mira për blerjen apo shitjen e pronave. Me anë të njohurive të thelluara të tregut ne sigurojmë mbështetje të plotë gjatë gjithë procesit, nga kërkimi dhe vlerësimi i pronës deri te negocimi dhe finalizimi i marrëveshjeve.

Me Alban&Co Studio, mund të jeni të sigurt se do të merrni shërbime të besueshme dhe të personalizuara që përmbushin nevojat dhe pritshmëritë tuaja.

Name: Big Sky Aerial Solutions
Description:
Big Sky Aerial Solutions provides high-precision sUAS services and geospatial expertise, delivering actionable insights for power utilities, AEC firms, and mapping professionals. We transform complex spatial data—LiDAR, point clouds, orthomosaics, and 3D models—into clear, reliable information that supports planning, design, inspections, and asset management.

Our team combines sUAS technology, photogrammetry, LiDAR, and GIS workflows to produce accurate, visually intuitive deliverables that help clients make faster, smarter, and more cost-effective decisions.

We work extensively with utilities to map transmission and distribution corridors, assess vegetation and encroachments, inspect structures, and document assets. In AEC and infrastructure projects, we support construction documentation, progress monitoring, and as-built verification, providing teams with actionable insights to improve efficiency and reduce risk.

Core capabilities:
- High-precision sUAS data collection
- LiDAR acquisition and point cloud processing
- Photogrammetry and orthomosaic production
- 3D modeling and digital twin creation
- GIS integration and spatial analysis
- Utility inspection and corridor monitoring
- Construction progress monitoring and as-built verification
- High-resolution aerial imagery for visualization and reporting
- Terrain mapping and land development mapping

Our mission is to combine technology, precision, and creativity to turn geospatial data into strategic decision-making tools, delivering reliable, actionable insights for utilities, infrastructure, and civil projects.

Name: GPEC Consulting Engineering
Description:
Tariq Consulting Engineers (Limited Liability) was established in February 1965 in Tehran by a group of geomatics experts to provide engineering services. The company is currently active in various fields, including land surveying, geodesy, microgeodesy, terrestrial and aerial photogrammetry, hydrography, cadastral surveying, database creation, , geographic information system (GIS) development, satellite image analysis and processing (remote sensing), urban planning and design, water resources engineering and management, river and coastal engineering, environmental and natural resource management, transportation engineering, and traffic engineering.

With over half a century of experience in geomatics, the company has rendered invaluable services in advancing regional infrastructure projects, successfully completing more than 500 civil throughout the Middle East.

Tariq Al-Irshad has facilitated the enhancement of technical and scientific knowledge and the attraction of business by sending personnel to educational institutions domestically and internationally on scholarships. In response to the need for project implementation, the company has invited both domestic and foreign professors and experts, whose expertise and knowledge have been utilized. In collaboration with academic institutions in Europe, it has designed software within the remote sensing (RS) framework. This exchange of ideas and insights represents the most significant scientific and technical capital of these consulting engineers.

In 2024, the company expanded its engineering services into the Sultanate of Oman under the name Gulf Planning and Engineering Consultancy (GPEC), providing specialized engineering services.

Tariq Al-Irshad is proud to continue providing exemplary services by combining over 50 years of engineering expertise with the capabilities of efficient and experienced personnel and young engineers, equipped with state-of-the-art hard

Description:
Mapmatics was born from a passion for geospatial technologies and the desire to make GIS more accessible, adaptable, and impactful for real-world business needs. Mapmatics was created to deliver custom GIS platforms—whether web-based, desktop, or mobile designed to fit each client’s unique data, processes, and goals.

Mapmatics originated as a freelance effort rooted in a passion for geospatial problem-solving. From early small-scale projects, it quickly grew into a trusted partner for SMEs. What distinguishes Mapmatics is our strategic focus on Open-Source GIS technologies—powering adaptable, scalable, and cost-efficient solutions across WebGIS, geodata management, custom desktop applications, surveying services, and product training.

Name: Österreichische Gesellschaft für Vermessung und Geoinformation
Description:
Wer sind wir?

Die OVG ist ein gemeinnütziger Verein, der die Anliegen aller Bereiche der Vermessung, der Kartographie, der Geodäsie und der Geoinformation in Österreich fördert und in den internationalen Organisationen und Dachverbänden vertritt. Im Verein sind alle an Vermessung und Geoinformation Interessierte vertreten, insbesondere die privaten Berufe, die öffentliche Verwaltung, Lehre und Forschung sowie die Studierenden.

Wir sind Mitglied in der Fédération Internationale des Géomètres (FIG) und der International Society for Photogrammetry and Remote Sensing (ISPRS).

Ziele der OVG

Wir fördern die Fachbereiche Vermessung und Geoinformation in Theorie und Praxis.
Wir nehmen Interessen der Vermessung und Geoinformation auf allen Gebieten der wissenschaftlichen Forschung und der praktischen Anwendung wahr.

Wir fördern den wissenschaftlichen Nachwuchs.

Wir veranstalten österreichweit Seminare und Vortragsreihen.

Precisie, betrouwbaarheid en efficiëntie staan binnen Brandsma Geometrie hoog in het vaandel. Brandsma Geometrie voert al uw meetkundige werkzaamheden uit, zoals het uitzetten en inmeten van terreinkenmerken, zoals perceelgrenzen en hoogten, of het in kaart brengen van bovengrondse objecten, zoals gebouwen, wegen, sporen, kunstwerken, etc. Daarnaast verzorgen wij uitzetwerk of machinebesturingsbestanden bij een nieuw te realiseren plan. Wij functioneren als katalysator tussen de planlocatie en (eigen) tekenkamer. De verkregen meetgegevens worden met behulp van onze intelligente tekenprogrammatuur getoetst op onjuistheden, waardoor maatvoeringsfouten in een vroeg stadium worden geëlimineerd. Dit alles met de vereiste precisie.

What sets us apart?
We’re not just technicians; we’re industry professionals with backgrounds in

From fire-damaged structures to portfolio digitisation, SYL helps you reduce risk, improve accuracy, and make decisions with certainty.
When the stakes are high, you need data you can trust. That’s what we deliver.

Our Services Include:
• Reality capture for construction progress and site verification
• Scan-to-BIM for refurbishment and estate management
• BIM model verification and tolerance checks
• Structural risk surveys for dangerous or fire-damaged buildings
• Evidential capture for insurance and legal disputes
• Portfolio digitisation for long-term planning and CAFM integration

Why Choose SYL?
• Accuracy and Compliance: Industry-grade data prepared for architects, engineers, insurers, and legal teams
• Risk Mitigation: Reduce uncertainty in complex or hazardous environments
• Cost Transparency: Clear pricing for scan-to-BIM, portfolio digitisation, and emergency works
• Usability: Deliverables that integrate into Revit workflows and digital twin strategies

SYL operates in a highly technical, compliance-driven space where decision-makers already understand reality capture and BIM. They’re not searching for definitions, they’re searching for solutions to workflow challenges, accuracy issues, and integration problems.

Name: Knights of Light
Description:
Knights of Light are surveyors based in London. We specialize in Right of Light Surveying across the UK, our main focus is defending homeowners' positions from overshadowing developments.

With two years of experience in the industry, Knights of Light aims to help homeowners protect their rights and find the best remedy for the detriment caused by nearby developments. 

Over £95 million in compensation goes unclaimed each year. This is due to the time and cost required to raise these claims. 

 

There are three remedies for overshadowing: injunction, cutback options, and compensation. Knights of Light has an experienced team of in-house surveyors who work closely with homeowners to find the right solution for you.

Our goal is to take all the risk off of homeowners' hands and ensure that the best remedy is found.

We enable you to compare multiple aspects of projects—from survey to survey and survey to plan—giving you complete visibility of your site's progress.

Our Capabilities
We specialise in both wide-area surveys for large tracts of land, quarries, and agricultural sites, as well as close-range inspection of buildings and infrastructure. Our advanced technology allows you to measure anything visible using points, lines, or polygons, including precise volume calculations for stockpiles and blast volumes.

The UAV Advantage
Our drone-based approach delivers remarkable advantages over traditional surveying methods:

80% reduction in survey time: Complete in just 2 days what traditionally takes 10 days for a 100-acre site

80% cost savings: £16,000 less per 100 acres compared to conventional methods

80% improvement in mapping accuracy: Achieve centimetre-level precision with dense point clouds

94% reduction in CO2 emissions: Environmentally responsible surveying for the modern world

We're passionate about transforming how the construction and development industries gather, analyse and utilise spatial data. Our cutting-edge drone technology, combined with sophisticated processing capabilities, delivers actionable insights that drive project success.

When precision, efficiency and comprehensive data matter, UAV Surveys & Information delivers results that traditional methods simply cannot match.

	•	3D modelleme ve coğrafi bilgi sistemleri (CBS): Modern teknolojilerle detaylı 3D modelleme ve CBS entegrasyonu gerçekleştiriyoruz.
	•	Karayolu, demiryolu ve altyapı projelerine destek: Ulaşım ve altyapı projelerinde haritalama ve mühendislik çözümleri sunuyoruz.

Göktürk Group, her projeye özel yaklaşımıyla, büyük ölçekli altyapı projelerinden küçük ölçekli bireysel projelere kadar geniş bir yelpazede hizmet sunmaktadır. Yalnızca Türkiye’de değil, dünyanın dört bir yanındaki projelerde de bilgi birikimimiz ve deneyimimizle hizmet vermeye hazırız. Uluslararası standartlara uygun çalışma anlayışımız, projelerimizi güvenilir bir şekilde yürütmemize olanak tanımaktadır.

Göktürk Group Harita ve Mühendislik olarak, kaliteli hizmet anlayışımızla sektördeki liderliğimizi sürdürmeyi ve müşterilerimiz için katma değer yaratmayı amaçlıyoruz. Her yeni projede, teknolojiyi ve uzmanlığımızı en iyi şekilde kullanarak sürdürülebilir, yenilikçi ve kalıcı çözümler sunuyoruz.

Name: Mapbakes.com
Description:
My journey in cartography began after completing my university degree in Sciences on the East Coast of Canada. On the advice of a relative who was a Geography Professor at a Canadian University I pursued a post-graduate program in GIS at the Centre of Geographic Sciences in Lawrencetown, Nova Scotia. Since then I've been lucky enough to work nearly 15 years in Western Canada for Engineering and Construction firms on some of the largest infrastructure projects worldwide, providing GIS and Remote Sensing expertise. 

More recently I've become familiar with a new mapping technique that goes beyond traditional hill shading methods common to popular mapping softwares. The process combines all my favorite parts of GIS and map making, being manipulation of DEMs, projections, and now 3d rendering. Above all though, I enjoy that the process takes maps created long before computers (in most cases) and gives them a brand new perspective or even a restoration. I don't want to take credit away from the great cartographers that have created some of these source maps, but I hope I do them the honour of bringing the maps a new life. 

The first map I created with the technique was the Nova Scotia 1:1M Topographic Map first published by Natural Resource Canada in 1967. When I printed it for the first time I was blown away. I truly hope you have the same reaction when which ever map you choose makes its way to you.

Eseguiamo acquisizioni ad alta precisione tramite laser scanner terrestre (TLS), strumentazione GNSS/GPS, stazioni totali e rilievo fotogrammetrico e Lidar con drone (UAV), con workflow orientati al controllo qualità e alla tracciabilità metrica del dato.

Trasformiamo le acquisizioni in output immediatamente utilizzabili: nuvole di punti registrate, ortofoto, elaborati CAD, modelli 3D e dataset strutturati integrabili in flussi CAD/BIM e nei processi di progettazione, analisi e cantiere.

Operiamo con un approccio engineering-oriented, focalizzato su accuratezza, standard di consegna e requisiti di progetto.

Name: SimpliFly
Description:
SimpliFly: Intelligent Aerial Data, Made Simple.

SimpliFly is your premier drone service provider, transforming complex aerial data into clear, actionable intelligence for commercial enterprises. We specialize in making high-quality data effortlessly accessible, empowering industries like Architecture, Engineering, Construction (AEC), Golf, Solar, Roofing, and Property Inspection.

Our mission is simple: elevate your business with precision and clarity. We deliver "Better, faster, Data," leveraging 7 years of experience and best-in-class drone technology. Forget waiting weeks for surveys; SimpliFly provides superior-quality imagery (often 12x better than satellite) and critical data within 3-4 days. This speed and accuracy save you time and money, allowing for smarter, faster decision-making.

We offer a suite of advanced solutions:

Orthomosaic Imagery: Ultra-high-resolution, up-to-date 2D maps for precise site visualization and progress monitoring.
Topography & LiDAR: Detailed 3D terrain models and contour maps crucial for accurate design, planning, and engineering.
Thermography: Infrared inspections to reveal hidden issues in solar panels, roofing, and building envelopes, preventing costly damage.
Volume Calculations: Swift and accurate stockpile measurements for mining, construction, and resource management.
At SimpliFly, we combine a "technical but simple" approach with a friendly, professional service. We're committed to being responsive, understanding your unique project needs, and delivering results that are not just data points, but valuable insights. Our process is streamlined, our outputs are intuitive, and our goal is to make your data work effortlessly for you.

Choose SimpliFly for precision aerial intelligence that drives efficiency and delivers a clear competitive edge. SimpliFly: Data, made simple.

GeoCadastre applies a least squares adjustment to the parcel fabric based on surveyed control and uniquely the adjustment is designed to preserve the shape of the surveyed polygon.
