Name: JUNIO
Description:
JUNIO är en enkätplattform och en webbpanel, som är framtagen för att barn och unga på ett enklare och roligare sätt ska kunna tycka till och påverka i frågor som rör dem.

I JUNIO-panelen kan vårdnadshavare registrera sitt eller sina barn som är mellan 6-17 år för att barnen ska kunna delta i enkätundersökningar och svara på frågor som rör barnens framtid och samtid. Alla barn under 15 år behöver vårdnadshavarens samtycke för att registrera sig, medan barn från 15 år kan välja att gå med själva. 

Webbpanelen JUNIO är också framtagen för att beslutsfattare lättare ska kunna fråga barnen när de ska ta beslut som rör dem. Undersökningarna som görs i JUNIO är oftast beställda av myndigheter, kommuner eller samhällsorganisationer.

Naš tim pruža kompletne geodetske usluge – od snimanja terena, obeležavanja objekata i izrade elaborata, do podrške u postupcima upisa u katastar i rešavanja imovinsko-pravnih pitanja. Geodezija D.A. Vučetić is a licensed surveying and geospatial services company based in Niš, Serbia, specializing in cadastral and engineering surveying for both private and corporate clients. Holding a Class I license from the Republic Geodetic Authority, we deliver precise, reliable, and compliant solutions for projects of any scale.

Our team provides comprehensive surveying services – from land measurement, construction staking, and preparation of official survey documents, to support in cadastral registration and resolution of property-rights matters. Our mission is to ensure safety and trust in every project through a combination of expertise, precision, and professional ethics, delivering consistent quality and reliable results to our clients.

Name: ER.Brownell & Assoc.
Description:
E.R. Brownell & Associates, Inc. was founded in Miami, Florida in 1953 and incorporated in 1968. Since its inception, the firm has been a trusted leader in land surveying and planning across Florida. Originally focused solely on land surveying, Brownell has grown to provide comprehensive land development support, including land planning, boundary analysis, easements, utilities, and surveying services for residential, commercial, and telecommunications projects.

Brownell’s team of skilled professionals and fully equipped survey crews leverage state-of-the-art technology, including GPS, total stations, 3D laser scanning, LiDAR, and Subsurface Utility Engineering to deliver precise, reliable, and cost-effective solutions. The firm serves governmental agencies, private clients, and sub-consultants with a steadfast commitment to competence, integrity, and professionalism.

As part of its ongoing growth, Brownell recently opened a new branch in Central Florida to better serve the Orlando area and surrounding communities, expanding its capacity to support projects across the state.

E.R. Brownell & Associates is proud to be entering its third generation of leadership with Steven Brownell, Jennifer Brownell-Davila, and Addier Aguila. Building on the legacy of Edwin Brownell, Thomas Brownell, and Angel Lopez, this new leadership team is committed to upholding the firm’s core values while embracing future challenges. With this vision, Brownell continues to provide exceptional land surveying, planning, and development services while honoring its rich history and tradition of excellence.

Name: Airborne Insights
Description:
Airborne Insights is ready to help when…

-You work in property planning, design, construction, inspection, marketing, safety, security, sales, marketing, maintenance, repair or modification.
-You operate in the residential, commercial, local authority, heritage, leisure, agricultural, transport and solar property sectors.
-You have a requirement for a condition inspection; business/property marketing, safety, security or planning photo/video; or 2D map/3D model.
-You need accurate, timely and actionable information regarding your property gathered and processed using the latest drone and software technology.
-You need someone to focus on gathering, processing and analysis of the necessary data.
-You need the data gathering operations to be quick and safe.
-You need a supplier that is easy to deal with, reliable, clear, competent, experienced, effective, flexible, organised, reliable, and trustworthy.
-You need to take action to increase the digitalisation and innovation in your business based on use of data.

Airborne Insights was established to help property and business owners & managers leverage the ability of drones to gather photographic data.

This is achieved either by delivery of photo and video. Or by human analysis of the photographs or video and production of written reports. Or by the computer processing of photographs and GPS location data using photogrammetry software to create centimetre accurate 2D maps and 3D models.

To eliminate the need for people working at height, significantly reducing both the time and cost to inspect or survey a property and improving workplace safety, Airborne Insights uses drones flying pre-planned & automated flight paths.

Airborne Insights drone operators and remote pilots are trained, qualified, authorised and insured to operate drones in UK airspace in accordance with UK Civil Aviation Authority requirements. We have the computer hardware and software required for the processing of photographs.

Name: rTek
Description:
rTek is a Kazakhstan-based NbS (Nature-Based Solutions) carbon project developer advancing large-scale carbon and grassland restoration across Central Asia. 

We design, implement, and manage carbon projects that regenerate degraded rangelands, improve rural livelihoods, and unlock access to high-integrity carbon markets. 

Our flagship project — developed under Verra VM0032 — will restore over 500,000 hectares of grassland in the Altai Steppe, one of the largest continuous grassland ecosystems on Earth.

rTek is involved in several other projects, focused on NbS- whether sequestering soil carbon on sunflower fields in North Kazakhstan under VM0042 (Integrated Agricultural Land Management), converting chicken manure to organic fertilizer and Biochar, and planting trees to regenerate historical forested areas near Almaty (VM0047). 

In addition to project development and measurement services, rTek, established in 2002, has a long history of traditional survey, UAS, and precision agriculture services. Partnered with KazNARU, rTek has established a world-class soil laboratory in Almaty, ready to provide services to an emerging carbon market. 
And, rTek provides a range of related services - from multispectral mapping by satellite and drone, to rTek's in-house FMIS (Farm Management Information System) and VRA (Variable Rate Application) tool TerraTune, to spinoff Mosaic Drone, our agricultural UAV company -- You can rely on rTek as your resilient partner for a new ag world.

Name: HELIADRONE
Description:
Le bureau d’étude HELIADRONE implanté en périphérie de ROUEN en Normandie  intervient dans divers domaines grâce à ses drones équipés de la technologie LiDAR. En topographie, nos drones réalisent des survols rapides et précis avec une précision centimétrique, surpassant les méthodes GPS traditionnelles des géomètres. Alors que ces derniers ne relèvent que quelques points, nos systèmes LiDAR capturent des millions de points, tous géoréférencés.

Nous sommes également spécialisés dans l’observation et la prévention des sites forestiers, permettant une gestion proactive des ressources naturelles. Dans le domaine archéologique, la technologie LiDAR révèle des traces d’activité humaine enfouies, ouvrant de nouvelles perspectives pour les chercheurs.

Pour l’observation des infrastructures et des bâtiments, nous créons des jumeaux numériques. Ces modèles permettent de prévenir les détériorations, facilitant des décisions rapides, efficaces et ciblées. Nos drones interviennent aussi dans des zones sensibles ou dangereuses, comme lors d’accidents ou de catastrophes naturelles, pour évaluer les dégâts et diriger les équipes au sol en toute sécurité.

Nous réalisons des relevés de volumes et de cubature extrêmement précis sur des sites miniers ou de carrières, fournissant une visualisation rapide de l’état des stocks. De plus, nous suivons l’avancement des chantiers pour assurer le bon déroulement des travaux, réduisant ainsi les risques de retards et les coûts supplémentaires associés.

Avec HELIADRONE, vous bénéficiez d’une expertise technique avancée et de solutions innovantes pour répondre à tous vos besoins en relevés et observations.

Name: AeroViews
Description:
AeroViews provides professional geospatial, drone mapping, LiDAR, and commercial drone photography and video services for commercial, industrial, and public-sector projects across Southern California and beyond.

We specialize in capturing accurate, engineering-grade aerial data and high-quality visual media that support planning, analysis, marketing, and long-term documentation. Our work bridges the gap between traditional surveying and inspection methods and modern aerial technology, delivering reliable datasets and visuals that integrate seamlessly into GIS, CAD, engineering, and marketing workflows.

Our geospatial services include drone LiDAR mapping, photogrammetry, orthomosaic imagery, digital surface models (DSM), digital elevation models (DEM), contour generation, and 3D models. These deliverables are commonly used for site planning, grading and drainage analysis, volumetric calculations, asset documentation, environmental monitoring, and progress tracking.

In parallel, AeroViews is a trusted provider of commercial drone photography and video for real estate, development, construction, infrastructure, and industrial assets. We capture high-resolution aerial imagery and cinematic video that showcase properties, document conditions, support leasing and investment marketing, and provide clear visual context for stakeholders and decision-makers.

We work with property owners, developers, engineers, planners, environmental consultants, asset managers, and project teams who require both precise spatial data and professional aerial visuals. Each project is scoped based on location, size, airspace considerations, risk profile, and required deliverables.

Our approach is detail-driven and data-first. Name: Urban Flight
Description:
Urban Flight is a leading drone survey firm in India, specializing in high-precision survey services that utilize advanced aerial technology. Our offerings include drone mapping, total station surveys, as-built surveys, contour mapping, and specialized surveying techniques tailored to client needs.
Using state-of-the-art Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) equipped with high-resolution imaging sensors, Urban Flight excels in drone mapping. This method enables rapid acquisition of geospatial data, producing orthophotos and digital surface models (DSMs) with exceptional accuracy. Our drone surveys are beneficial for urban planning, infrastructure development, and environmental monitoring, providing stakeholders with critical insights for informed decision-making.
In addition to drone mapping, we employ advanced total station technology for precise terrestrial surveys. Our surveyors utilize electronic distance measurement (EDM) and angular measurement to establish control points, ensuring the integrity of horizontal and vertical datums across various engineering projects. This integration of traditional and modern methods guarantees reliable results.
Our as-built survey services capture the actual dimensions and conditions of structures post-construction. Using laser scanning and photogrammetry, we provide detailed documentation essential for project verification and compliance.
Contour mapping is another core competency, generating topographic maps that illustrate terrain elevation and slope gradients. This information is crucial for land use planning and environmental assessments, enabling clients to optimize land management strategies effectively.
Urban Flight is committed to delivering high-quality, data-driven solutions tailored to our clients' requirements. Our expertise in drone surveying, combined with a focus on innovation and customer satisfaction, positions us as a trusted leader in geospatial services in India.

Name: AeroVector Geospatial
Description:
AeroVector Geospatial is a Montana‑based aviation and geospatial services company built on a simple but powerful principle: precision begins with perspective. By integrating crewed aviation, advanced drone systems, and modern geospatial workflows into a single vertically aligned platform, AeroVector delivers high‑accuracy mapping, imaging, and spatial intelligence to clients across the Mountain West. The company operates at the intersection of aviation, technology, and land management, providing data products that empower landowners, architects, ranchers, developers, and public agencies to make confident, informed decisions about the terrain they manage and the projects they build.
Founded in the heart of the historic Nine Mile Mining District, AeroVector Geospatial was created to solve a persistent problem in the region: traditional mapping providers are either too slow, too generic, or too disconnected from the realities of Western landscapes. Montana’s terrain demands a different approach—one that blends aviation mobility, field‑ready expertise, and geospatial precision. AeroVector was designed from the ground up to meet that need. By combining aircraft‑enabled reach with drone‑level detail, the company offers a level of responsiveness and accuracy that conventional providers cannot match.
At its core, AeroVector Geospatial is an aviation‑enabled mapping company. The aircraft is not an accessory to the business—it is the backbone of the operational model. With the ability to rapidly deploy across Montana, Idaho, Wyoming, and the broader Mountain West, AeroVector eliminates the logistical bottlenecks that slow down traditional survey and mapping workflows. Whether the mission involves a remote ranch, a large timber parcel, a mining claim, or a development site miles from the nearest paved road, AeroVector arrives quickly, operates efficiently, and delivers data products with exceptional clarity and consistency.

Description:
Ponton Creations is a studio specializing in reality capture for the built environment. Core services include 3D laser scanning of interiors and exteriors, scan‑to‑BIM/CAD modeling, and immersive virtual tours that turn existing spaces into accurate, shareable digital assets. 

Projects range from apartments and hospitality e-marketing virtual tour assets to precise heritage surveys and bigger built structures captured for professional architectural 3D design. 

The approach is practical: capture once, use everywhere. Point clouds and models are delivered in various formats different teams can already use and slot into Archicad, Revit and AutoCAD workflows for faster design decisions, precise quantities, and smoother coordination. 

For owners and contractors, the pre‑build “as‑is” record reduces risk, avoids costly rework, and preserves a verifiable baseline for maintenance and future works. For architects and designers, accurate 3D data means fewer site visits, fewer surprises, and clearer communication with clients. If the goal is better plans, better bids, and better builds, Ponton Creations provides the measurable foundation.

Name: Projesolos Engenharia
Description:
Bem-vindo a Projesolos, onde a precisão, a qualidade e o compromisso são a base de nossos serviços em topografia e engenharia civil. Com 12 anos de experiência sólida, nos tornamos líderes na indústria, atendendo a projetos de grande escala em todo o Brasil.

Quem Somos:
A Projesolos é muito mais do que uma empresa de topografia; somos uma equipe apaixonada de profissionais dedicados a superar os desafios em terrenos complexos, usando tecnologia de ponta e soluções personalizadas. Nossos serviços abrangem uma ampla gama de necessidades de topografia, incluindo georreferenciamento, levantamento topográfico, mapeamento com drones e tecnologia LiDAR.

Nossa Missão:
Nosso compromisso é claro: transformar dados em conhecimento significativo que impulsiona o sucesso de projetos. Entendemos que cada terreno é único, e nossa abordagem personalizada nos permite superar obstáculos, adaptar-nos às complexidades do ambiente e entregar resultados confiáveis, independentemente do tamanho ou escala do projeto.

Nossa Diferença:
Tecnologia Inovadora: Investimos em tecnologia de ponta, incluindo drones de última geração e a tecnologia LiDAR, para garantir precisão e eficiência excepcionais em todos os nossos projetos.
Compromisso com a Qualidade: A qualidade é nossa assinatura. Cada medição, cada mapa e cada análise que fornecemos é respaldado por rigorosos processos de controle de qualidade.
Experiência Comprovada: Nossa equipe é formada por especialistas experientes em topografia e engenharia civil, prontos para enfrentar os desafios mais complexos.

Porque Escolher a Projesolos:
Escolher a Projesolos significa escolher uma parceria confiável e comprometida. Estamos prontos para contribuir para o sucesso do seu projeto, não importa o quão ambicioso seja. Nossa reputação é construída na satisfação do cliente e na entrega consistente de resultados excepcionais.

Technologies and Tools

The company utilizes cutting-edge technologies such as:
	•	GIS platforms for spatial data visualization.

Client Benefits

Industries Served

	•	Urban planning and development.

	•	Government agencies and municipalities.

Name: MapShop UK
Description:
MapShop brings the world to your wall.
We specialise in high-quality printed maps for classrooms, homes, offices, and educational environments, helping people explore, learn and decorate with confidence.

Unlike mass-produced posters, every map is printed on demand, ensuring you receive the most up-to-date version, freshly produced in the UK. Whether you’re looking for a political world map for the classroom, a decorative map for your home office, or a thematic map for teaching geography, MapShop has something for every space.

Our range includes:

 World & Continental Maps – from classic Mercator to Equal-Area projections like Hobo-Dyer and Peters

 UK & Regional Maps – detailed wall maps for study and display

 Educational Maps – designed for clarity and learning in schools, colleges and universities

 Decorative & Designer Maps – including Dark Mode, vintage and artistic styles

All our maps are produced on high-quality paper stocks in a variety of sizes up to A0, with careful attention to colour accuracy and cartographic detail. We work closely with Oxford Cartographers, ensuring exceptional accuracy and design pedigree in every product.

Our customers include teachers, students, geography departments, interior designers, and anyone with a passion for the world. Whether you’re outfitting a classroom, curating a library wall, or finding the perfect gift, we make it simple to order online and have maps delivered directly to you.

 Explore the full range at map-shop.co.uk

GUAY is an Ecuadorian company that provides environmental consulting and cartography services based on GIS technologies through the use of specialized hardware and software for the development of personal, corporate, and government projects by capturing and analyzing spatial and temporal data.
Data Capture: Collection of data from various sources, including open source maps, internal data, and online data.
Spatial and Temporal Analysis: Identification of trends, patterns, and correlations in spatial and temporal data.
Map Production: Creation of maps for publication, including thematic maps, location maps, and more.
Geoprocessing: Conversion of spatial data into business graphics and integration of data from different disciplines.
3D Modeling: Creation of 3D models and visualizations of spatial data.
GIS Application Development: Creation of GIS applications for the collection and/or exploitation of geospatial data.
Mobile GIS Solutions: Collection and analysis of geographic data in real time.
Cartography: Design of contour and relief maps, object classification, digital photogrammetry, and export of maps in different formats.

Description:
Trabalhamos com consultoria, projetos e laudos técnicos nas áreas de mineração, construção civil e manejo de recursos hídricos e naturais. 
Aliamos a experiência e reconhecimento acadêmico com a capacidade técnica multidisciplinar e inovadora, utilizando metodologias reconhecidas e confiáveis.

Oportunidades
1. Pesquisa e Exploração Mineral: a busca por minerais estratégicos que permitam desenvolvimento tecnológico e a transição energética.

3. Recursos Hídricos e o uso sustentável da água: projetos de gestão, manejo e outorga da água são essenciais para garantir sustentabilidade e a segurança hídrica para as próximas gerações.  

4. Sustentabilidade e responsabilidade social: A crescente preocupação com o meio ambiente e a responsabilidade social abre espaço para a Volcano Geoconsultoria se destacar por suas práticas sustentáveis e compromisso com o desenvolvimento local.

Forças
1. Expertise técnica: A Volcano Geoconsultoria possui uma equipe altamente qualificada e experiente em geologia, geotecnia e hidrogeologia, o que lhe confere uma sólida base técnica para oferecer soluções de alta qualidade.

2. Compromisso com a sustentabilidade: A empresa se destaca pelo seu comprometimento com práticas sustentáveis, o que a coloca em uma posição favorável em um mercado cada vez mais preocupado com questões ambientais.

3. Inovação: A Volcano Geoconsultoria utiliza metodologias inovadoras e consagradas, aliadas a tecnologias avançadas, para garantir resultados precisos em seus projetos.

Name:
Skykam | Sensor Intelligence Across Air, Land & Water
Part of The Unmanned Organisation
Description:
Part of The Unmanned Organisation – Specialists in Advanced Sensor Data Capture

Skykam is redefining how sensor data is captured, analysed, and delivered — across air, land, and water.

As part of The Unmanned Organisation, Skykam provides advanced unmanned data capture using aerial, surface, and aquatic platforms equipped with next-generation sensors including LiDARTrace, AirTrace, MagTrace, and WaterTrace.

Each platform is designed for a specific domain — from methane emissions and magnetic field detection to LiDAR mapping and aquatic emissions tracking — creating a fully integrated approach to environmental and engineering intelligence.

Core Capabilities:
• LiDARTrace – High-resolution LiDAR mapping with RTK precision
• AirTrace – Methane, H₂S & emissions detection and mapping
• MagTrace – Magnetic field & subsurface ferrous material detection
• WaterTrace – Aquatic emissions & waterborne sensor mapping
• Multispectral & photogrammetry mapping for environmental insight
• Bathymetric & CHIRP sonar surveys using autonomous USV systems
• Thermal, roof & façade inspections for infrastructure and industry
• Confined-space & robotic inspection solutions

Every project is built on innovation, data integrity, and safety, transforming complex sensor measurements into actionable intelligence where traditional methods can’t reach.

Based in the UK, operating nationally and internationally.

Description: The Maryland Geological Survey, created in 1896, is a scientific-investigative organization of the State of Maryland. The Survey is charged with investigating the geologic and water resources of Maryland through the application of the various disciplines within earth science. Its primary mission includes investigation and monitoring of water resources, geologic, topographic, and geophysical mapping, environmental geology, mineral resources, and coastal and estuarine geology.

Name: iRAMA.AI
Description:
iRAMA.AI (Intelligent Road Asset Monitoring and Assessment) is an advanced edge-AI and cloud platform designed to transform the way road networks are monitored, maintained, and managed.

Using AI-powered vision systems, IoT sensors, and real-time data analytics, iRAMA.AI enables authorities, contractors, and stakeholders to:

Detect and classify road distresses (potholes, cracks, faded markings, damaged signs, barriers, etc.) in real time.

Build reliable datasets of road assets and anomalies for research, planning, and policymaking.

Access interactive dashboards with maps, charts, and visual storytelling for actionable insights.

Reduce survey costs, improve safety, and accelerate maintenance response times.


Developed at SAFETRIP Lab, IIT Roorkee, with support from the iHub DivyaSampark, IIT Roorkee,  iRAMA.AI bridges cutting-edge academic research with real-world deployment.

We aim to make roads safer, smarter, and sustainable by offering a scalable solution for cities, highways, and infrastructure agencies.

 Visit: https://irama.ai

We provide personalised and professional survey services to the government and private sector, and are approved suppliers to undertake land survey services to the Western Australia Department of Planning, Lands and Heritage and the Public Transport Authority.

We are committed to providing a safe and healthy working environment for all employees, with procedures in place to minimise injuries and hazards.

Dlaczego my?

Nowoczesna Technologia: Wykorzystujemy najnowsze technologie i sprzęt geodezyjny, co pozwala nam na precyzyjne i szybkie realizowanie nawet najbardziej skomplikowanych zadań.

Name: DeepSea-k
Description:
# DeepSea-K

DeepSea-K is an innovative marine technology startup revolutionizing how we connect with and understand deep sea ecosystems. Our mobile application maps and catalogs deep sea marine life, creating the world's most comprehensive digital atlas of these largely unexplored habitats.

## Our Mission

We're bridging the gap between scientific discovery and public engagement through accessible technology. Each marine species in our database features detailed information, conservation status, and a unique QR code that links to our exclusive merchandise collection.

## What Makes Us Unique

Our platform allows users to "adopt" specific marine species, tracking new discoveries and conservation efforts in real-time. Every merchandise purchase through our QR system directly supports marine conservation initiatives and further deep sea exploration.

## Technology Meets Conservation

DeepSea-K combines cutting-edge mapping technology, marine biology expertise, and consumer engagement to create a sustainable model for ocean conservation. Our team of marine biologists, software developers, and conservation specialists works collaboratively to expand our understanding of the ocean's most mysterious inhabitants.

Join us in exploring the uncharted depths and supporting the preservation of these vital ecosystems for future generations.

#OceanTech #MarineConservation #DeepSeaExploration #SustainableTech

Our goal is to support the expansion of the OSM project in developing and least developed countries (LDCs) in the French-speaking world, to promote quality open geodata and the local capacity to create and use them to produce the geographic commons necessary for harmonious territorial development.

Association of law 1901 since spring 2017, we work mainly from community empowerment devices of mostly young OSM contributors, coming from grassroots community organizations, university, co-working spaces, labs and technophile hubs or already active in government institutions, local or international NGOs or international organizations, so that they work together as a geomatics community.

Inspired by the commons movement, we make available open source collective tools and our pedagogical materials under free license.

Name: SKYSMART
Description:
SKYSMART jest firmą zrzeszającą pasjonatów i specjalistów z zakresu technologii bezzałogowych. Od lat specjalizujemy się w wykonywaniu usług i szkoleń z wykorzystanie bezzałogowych statków powietrznych. Pierwsze kroki w tej branży stawialiśmy na wiele lat przed popularyzacją dronów w naszym kraju. 

Realizujemy usług lotnicze z wykorzystaniem najnowszej, stale aktualizowanej floty bezzałogowych statków powietrznych od renomowanych producentów na terytorium całego kraju. Doradzamy w zakresie zabezpieczenia i ochrony obiektów infrastruktury krytycznego, spółek sektora energetycznego, chemicznego, imprez masowych oraz innych strategicznych lokalizacji przed ingerencją niepożądanych dronów. 

W naszej ofercie znajduje się szeroki wachlarz usług, takich jak:

Zabezpieczenie i ochrona infrastruktury krytycznej. (m. in. testy systemów antydronowych, analiza zagrożeń związanych z wykorzystaniem dronów, doradźtwo przy wyborze skutecznych zabezpieczeń antydronowych)
Inspekcje wszelkiego rodzaju. (m. in. inspekcje linii energetycznych, masztów antenowych, turbin wiatrowych, budowlane, badanie jakości powietrza)
Usługi lotnicze dla rolnictwa (m. in. monitorowanie upraw, zbieranie danych z pól, mapowanie multispektralne terenów, monitorowanie stanu infrastruktury rolniczej)
Usługi lotnicze dla leśnictwa (m. in. monitorowanie stanów lasów, mapowanie terenu, inwentaryzacja drzewostanu, monitorowanie kłusownictwa)
Usługi lotnicze dla łowiectwa (m. in. patrolowanie obszarów łowieckich, monitorowanie popularności zwierząt, badania terenowe)
Poszukiwanie osób zaginionych (m. in z wykorzystaniem termowizji i dedykowanych programów poszukiwawczo-ratowniczych)
Usługi związane z wykorzystaniem dronów podwodnych (ROV) (m. in. inspekcje obiektów podwodnych, inspekcje infrastruktury w środowisku płynnym - zbiorniki retencyjne etc.)
Szkolenia z pilotażu dronów oraz specjalistyczne (m. in. A2, NSTS-01-07, STS-01-02)

At Fem Associates Nigeria, we are passionate about unlocking the mysteries of the water world through cutting-edge hydrographic surveying solutions. As a leading hydrographic surveying company, we provide comprehensive and reliable services to support a wide range of maritime and aquatic projects.

With our in-depth knowledge and commitment to quality, we help our clients navigate the complexities of the aquatic environment, ensuring safe operations and sustainable practices.

Our clients are at the heart of everything we do. We believe in building strong and lasting relationships, understanding their unique requirements, and tailoring our services to meet their specific needs. Our team works closely with clients throughout the surveying process, providing continuous support and transparent communication to deliver results that exceed expectations.

 Innovation and Excellence 
Innovation drives our success. We continuously invest in research and development to stay at the forefront of the hydrographic surveying industry. Our commitment to excellence has earned us accolades from satisfied clients and has solidified our position as a trusted partner in the field.

Name: RFD Advanced Drone Solutions
Description:
At RFD Advanced Drone Solutions, we specialize in professional drone services tailored for the construction industry. We provide the critical aerial data that General Contractors, Project Managers, architects, and site leadership need to build smarter, safer, and more efficiently.

In today's complex construction landscape, seamless alignment between design intent and on-site execution is paramount. We bridge that gap. By **pairing powerful weekly progress videos with actionable data—including 3D Point Clouds, Orthomosaic Maps, and As-Built vs. BIM analysis—**RFD empowers you to make proactive, data-driven decisions.

**Our Core Solutions:**

**Design Validation & As-Built Verification:** We create survey-grade 3D models and Point Clouds that allow Architects and GCs to compare construction progress against BIM models. This identifies deviations early, prevents costly rework, and ensures design integrity from foundation to facade.

**Construction Progress & Site Intelligence:** Keep projects on schedule and on budget with high-resolution Orthomosaic Maps and detailed progress reports delivered through the DroneDeploy platform. We provide objective, measurable data for tracking milestones, verifying contractor work, and managing stockpiles.

**Stakeholder Communication & Marketing:** We produce compelling, professionally edited video and photo updates that clearly communicate project status to owners, investors, and community stakeholders, saving your team valuable time and enhancing your firm's reputation.

Based in Fort Lauderdale, we are fully FAA Part 107 Certified and insured, with an uncompromising commitment to safety and data accuracy. We are your trusted partner in lever

Name: CIMETI-R
Description:
CIMETI-R — Spécialiste de la gestion, de la cartographie et du contrôle technique du patrimoine funéraire.

CIMETI-R accompagne les collectivités et les acteurs privés du secteur funéraire dans toutes les problématiques liées aux cimetières, crématoriums, columbariums et monuments commémoratifs. Notre cœur de mission : offrir une vision claire, précise et exploitable des infrastructures afin de sécuriser les opérations, moderniser la gestion et valoriser le patrimoine.

Nos expertises principales :

Cartographie & SIG : plans géoréférencés complets, intégration pour logiciels métiers, couches thématiques (concessions, circulations, zones sensibles, végétation).

Modélisation 3D & orthophoto : relevés haute définition pour projets d’aménagement, diagnostics structurels et suivi patrimonial.

Inspection des monuments et sépultures : analyse des affaissements, stabilité des stèles, état des columbariums, relevés des zones à risque et inventaire des sépultures anciennes.

Détection d’anomalies : identification d’infiltrations, subsidence, désordres structurels ou zones fragilisées.

Accompagnement opérationnel : aide à la mise en place de plans de gestion, priorisation des travaux, pilotage des décisions techniques.


CIMETI-R intervient également auprès des entreprises du funéraire pour les accompagner dans leurs habilitations réglementaires :

Inspections des véhicules funéraires (état, équipements, conformité opérationnelle).

Contrôles des chambres funéraires (capacité, équipements techniques, état sanitaire, zones sensibles).

Vérifications techniques en crématoriums (zones d’accueil, équipements sensibles, environnements extérieurs).
Un appui technique qui permet aux opérateurs d’aborder leur habilitation avec sérénité, preuves à l’appui.


Notre promesse : des données fiables, des rapports exploitables immédiatement et une approche pragmatique centrée sur la sécurité, la précision et la continuité de service.

Name: Laçin Harita ve Mühendislik
Description:
Kurulduğumuz günden bu güne Laçin Harita ve Mühendislik hiç ara vermeden kendi faaliyet alanında işine devam etmektedir.
Birçok proje uygulamasında görev almış ve aldığı görevlerin tamamını layıkıyla yerine getirmiştir. Üstesinden gelemeyip altından kalkamadığımız hiçbir proje yoktur.
        Amacımız standart tekniklere ve teçhizata bağlı kalmayıp teknolojiyi yakından takip ederek güncel modern ve hassas ölçme aletleri ile mükemmeliyet ve memnuniyeti yakalamayı benimsemektir.
        Bizim için esas olan kaliteli iş yapmak ve bunu yaparken de iş verenin güvenini kazanmaktır. Önce kalite diyerek gerçekleştirilen işin biçimini belirler ve en düşük maliyeti ortaya cıkarır. Esas amacı düşük maliyet ve hızlı üretim ile gerçekleştireceği bu çalışmalar sayesinde sektörümüzde üstünlük sağlamak, kalıcı olmak ve memnun müşteriler kazanmaktır.
       Firmamız Kırşehir Kaman'da olup uygun gördüğünüzde ofisimizi ve mevcut durumumuzu sergilemeye ayrıca görüşmeye hazır bulunmaktayız.

Name: No Trace Survey
Description:
No Trace Survey: Landmeten, uitzetten en meer

Als landmeter speel ik een cruciale rol bij de planning, het ontwerp en de bouw van verschillende projecten door nauwkeurige metingen te leveren, grenzen vast te stellen, locaties uit te zetten en gegevens om te zetten in CAD-tekeningen. Ik breng die precisie, aandacht voor detail en expertise mede door het gebruik van geavanceerde landmeetkundige technologie en CAD-software.


Keurmeester NEN3140

Als keurmeester NEN3140 houd ik me bezig met het keuren van elektrische installaties en apparaten volgens de NEN3140 normen. Dit betekent dat ik controleer of alles voldoet aan de veiligheidsvoorschriften en technische eisen die hierin zijn vastgesteld en bedoeld om ongevallen te voorkomen en te zorgen voor een veilige werkomgeving. 
Bovendien voel ik mij verantwoordelijk voor het geven van advies. Als ik tekortkomingen of risico’s ontdek, bespreek ik deze met de betrokken partijen. Dit kan variëren van het aanbevelen van aanpassingen tot het geven van tips over veilig gebruik en onderhoud.


Keurmeester Landbouw-, tuin-, park-, en bouwmachines

Als keurmeester inspecteer ik niet alleen de fysieke staat van de machines, maar ook de bijbehorende veiligheidsprocedures en de documentatie. Dit betekent dat ik regelmatig de bijgeleverde gebruiksaanwijzingen zal moeten raadplegen. Het is belangrijk om te weten wat er van de machine verwacht mag worden en hoe deze presteert onder verschillende omstandigheden. 
Een ander leuk aspect van mijn werk is de interactie met de mensen die deze machines gebruiken. Of het nu een boer is die zijn oogst optimaliseert of een tuinman die een siertuin onderhoudt, iedereen heeft zijn eigen verhalen en ervaringen. Het maakt mijn werk niet alleen educatief maar ook sociaal en inspirerend!

Om een zo compleet mogelijk pakket aan diensten aan te bieden werkt No Trace Survey vaak samen met de professionals bij Van Bale Dienstverlening, Bats Adviesbureau en Nieuwenhuis GWW.

Name: ZULU TECHNOLOGIES LLP
Description:
We offer cutting-edge solutions for all your mapping and land surveying needs. With our advanced aerial mapping and LiDAR (Light Detection and Ranging) technology, we provide unparalleled accuracy and precision in capturing detailed topographic data from above.

At Zulu, we understand that accurate mapping is crucial for a wide range of industries and projects. Whether you're involved in construction, infrastructure development, urban planning, environmental assessment, or land management, our comprehensive surveying solutions are tailored to meet your specific requirements.

Our skilled team of surveyors and technicians utilize state-of-the-art equipment and advanced geospatial techniques to ensure the highest level of data quality. Through aerial mapping, we capture high-resolution imagery, enabling us to create detailed maps and 3D models of your project area. Additionally, our LiDAR mapping services provide incredibly precise elevation data, revealing even the finest terrain details and assisting in volumetric analysis.

With our expertise in land surveying, we go beyond mapping by offering a wide range of survey solutions. Our experienced surveyors employ traditional and advanced surveying techniques, such as GNSS (Global Navigation Satellite System) and total station surveying, to gather accurate measurements of boundaries, contours, and features on the ground.

What sets us apart is our commitment to delivering actionable insights derived from the collected data. Our team of experts analyzes the data and provides comprehensive reports and visualizations, enabling you to make informed decisions for your projects. Whether it's identifying potential risks, optimizing site layout, or improving resource allocation, we empower you with the knowledge to drive success.

Nuestro compromiso: trasformar desafíos, en soluciones topográficas de alto rendimiento.

At TerraGrafic, we elevate precision in high-complexity construction projects. Through advanced technology such as robotic stations, GNSS devices, and drones, we ensure a perfect fit between plans and terrain. We provide on-site assistance to optimize measurements, staking, and guide work, adapting to project needs and deadlines, guaranteeing structural alignments with maximum accuracy. Additionally, during monitoring and control, reviewing and processing the project is another step in our work, allowing us to anticipate and detect potential errors or inconsistencies, ensuring confidence in the project for developers, designers, and builders, and delivering execution on time and in shape to the final client.

Our commitment: transforming challenges into high-performance topographic solutions.

Somos expertos en la generación de Modelos Digitales a partir de la tecnología LiDAR, proveyendo datos precisos y detallados para estudios específicos como el análisis de riesgos, proyectos de ingeniería, desarrollos urbanos sustentables, cálculos volumétricos, estudios forestales y agrícolas, hidrografía e hidrología, entre otros.

Contamos con la experiencia del personal y el equipamiento necesario para realizar estudios que involucran la consecución y el tratamiento de datos satelitales, tales como estudios de interferometría de radar, generación de modelos digitales con imágenes de satélite, estudios de crecimiento urbano, entre otros. 

Además, contamos con basta experiencia en el desarrollo de plataformas SIG en software libre, para diferentes usos, como análisis de datos geoespaciales, gestión catastral y predial, en donde se involucra tanto información cartográfica como alfanumérica.

Name: The Mobile App
Description:
At MOBILE, we believe navigating the world should be simple, safe, and empowering for everyone. Our mission is to make cities more accessible by building the first pedestrian navigation app designed specifically for people with disabilities—starting with wheelchair users. Too often, everyday mobility requires unnecessary struggle and resilience. We’re here to change that.

Through community-driven hazard reporting and smart technology, MOBILE helps users find the most accessible routes in real time. Sidewalk obstacles, steep inclines, broken elevators, or temporary construction no longer have to be unexpected barriers. With MOBILE, accessibility becomes visible.

Our vision is to extend beyond disability to support anyone who faces mobility challenges—whether pushing a stroller, carrying luggage, or wearing high heels—because inclusive design benefits everyone. At the same time, we’re building partnerships with cities, businesses, and communities to create a more welcoming and usable urban environment.

We’re driven by the belief that technology should serve humanity with empathy and practicality. MOBILE is built to be intuitive, supportive, and empowering—because true innovation makes life feel lighter, not harder.

Join us as we chart a new path forward—one sidewalk, one street, one city at a time.

At Spatial Boulevard, we are passionate about geospatial innovation and excellence. We are committed to delivering high-quality results that meet your needs and expectations. A 2024-es évtől kezdve már új dimenzókban próbálhatják ki magukat kollégáink, többek között talajradar is került már a repertoárunkba.



-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------  



Over nearly a quarter of a century, T-Survey Ltd. has become one of the leading geodetic and cartographic companies in the South Transdanubia region. Our objectives include reflecting reality as accurately and precisely as possible for our clients, delivering the best of our engineering geodesy expertise. Name: Vermessungsbüro Frenken
Description:
Öffentlich bestellter Vermessungsingenieur

Wir sind ein modernes Vermessungsbüro und bieten Ihnen ein breites Portfolio an Dienstleistungen. Unser erfahrenes Team berät Sie gerne und agiert dynamisch und  lösungsorientiert, um Ihre Vorhaben nach Ihren Wünschen zu bearbeiten.

Konventionelle Vermessung:
Wir bieten Ihnen jegliche Dienstleistung für Ihr Bauvorhaben, 
ob Grundstücksteilungen, Gebäudeeinmessungen, Planungsgrundlagen, (amtliche) Lagepläne, Absteckungen oder Grenzfeststellungen und -anzeigen. 

Drohnenvermessung/ UAV:
Wir bieten auftragsbezogene und individuelle Befliegung mit anschließender Auswertung der Drohnendaten. Durch dieses Verfahren sind große Planungsgrundlagen oder Massenberechnung möglich. Weiterhin können wir mittels Thermalkameras beispielsweise bei der Rehkitz-Rettung oder auch bei der Kontrolle von PV-Anlagen unterstützen.

Laserscanning:
Wir bieten Ihnen die Möglichkeit Ihre Vorhaben anhand von detailreichen Punktwolken umzusetzen. So können beispielsweise Änderungen von Inneneinrichtungen genauestens geplant werden, aber auch gesamte Fassadenstrukturen erfasst werden. Sollten Grundrisse oder andere Pläne abhanden gekommen sein, lassen sich diese aus den Scandaten anfertigen.

Gewässervermessung:
Wir bieten die Erfassung des Tiefenverlaufs Ihres Gewässers. So können Kies- und Baggerseen überwacht und (Alt-)Arme von Gewässern kontrolliert werden. Weiterhin können so auch individuell Projekte geplant und realisiert werden.

Wertgutachten:
Wir bieten Ihnen eine neutrale und unparteiische Ermittlung des Verkehrswertes Ihrer Immobilie. So können Sie mit stichtagsbezogenen, aktuellen Werten arbeiten.


Kontaktieren Sie uns - Wir freuen uns Sie beraten und Ihr Anliegen unbürokratisch lösen zu können.

De Fakto Inspection er del af De Fakto Rådgivende landinspektører, som levere valide opmålingsdata - vores kerne ydelser er: 
Satellitscreening – præcise data fra oven
Satellitscreening er én af vores specialiserede ydelser hos De Fakto Inspection.
Vi registrerer selv små bevægelser i jordoverfladen og identificerer områder, bygninger og anlæg, hvor der kan være behov for overvågning eller teknisk vurdering. Dataene giver et objektivt overblik og kan bruges alene eller som supplement til eksisterende målinger.Kørende nivellementer – præcision på jorden
Vi udfører kørende nivellementer langs veje, dæmninger og ledningsstrækninger.
Denne metode registrerer højdeforskelle med millimeternøjagtighed og dokumenterer sætninger og deformationer, også dér hvor satellitdata har begrænsninger.

Kombinationen af satellit- og jordbaserede målinger sikrer et komplet og detaljeret datagrundlag.

Selskapet ble etablert i juni 2023 av Kjetil Teigen, som startet virksomheten alene. Fra første dag har vi levert kvalitetstjenester til kunder med behov for profesjonell og nøyaktig landmåling. Gjennom vårt arbeid har vi bygget opp en sterk faglig plattform og et godt rykte i bransjen.

I desember 2024 ble Topograf AS en del av Plan og Eiendom AS, som har en tydelig ambisjon om å videreutvikle selskapet til å bli en ledende aktør innen eiendomslandmåling. Med støtte fra våre nye eiere satser vi på videre vekst, innovasjon og stadig bedre tjenester for våre kunder.

Name: Ingenieurgesellschaft Falasch
Description:
Seit 1998 sind wir als erfahrene Vermessungsingenieure an Ihrer Seite – zuverlässig, verantwortungsbewusst und mit einem klaren Fokus auf Qualität. 
Unser Ziel ist es, Sie während der gesamten Bauphase mit unserem umfassenden Know-how zu unterstützen – vom ersten Bauplan bis zur Fertigstellung. Dabei bieten wir Ihnen maßgeschneiderte, bedarfsorientierte Lösungen, da jedes Projekt für uns einzigartig ist.

Unser Leistungsspektrum umfasst eine breite Palette an Vermessungsaufgaben im Bereich Hoch- und Tiefbau. 

-Ingenieurvermessung: Wir übernehmen alle Aufgaben der Entwurfsvermessung, baubegleitenden Vermessung sowie Spezial- und Präzisionsaufgaben im Maschinen- und Anlagenbau.

Architekturvermessung: Ob klassische 2D Pläne oder 3D-Modellierung, ob verformungsgerecht oder  vereinfachtes Flächenaufmaß – wir sind allen Ihren Anforderungen gewachsen. Und nicht nur das – durch den Einsatz von Laserscannern und Fotodrohnen können wir bei Bedarf Mehrwert in Form von ansprechenden Bild- und Videomaterial gleich mitliefern!

Hydrographie: Mit modernster Echolottechnik und spezieller Software führen wir hydrographische Vermessungen im Binnenwasserbereich durch. Das Aufgabenspektrum reicht dabei von Überwachungsaufgaben rund ums Gewässer  über Entwurfsvermessungen für Bauvorhaben bis hin zu  3D Gewässersohlen zu Beweissicherung- oder Dokumentationszwecken.

Zu unseren Auftraggebern zählen neben Fachämtern und staatlichen Institutionen auch private Auftraggeber wie Bauunternehmen, Architektur- und Ingenieurbüros. Wir arbeiten sowohl in Dresden und Umgebung als auch bundesweit und international.

Unser Hauptziel ist es, Ihnen ein effizientes und zeitsparendes Bauen zu ermöglichen – wir freuen uns auf Ihr Projekt!

Name: KELM Solutions
Description:
KELM Solutions, since 2014, has been providing comprehensive aerial imaging and spatial information processing services with the support of unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs). We utilize digital imagery, photogrammetry techniques, laser scanning, and direct in-situ measurements to deliver professional spatial solutions, including terrain and object modeling, orthophotomaps, visual inspections, object inventories, volumetric calculations, and change analysis.

Our company combines a passion for aviation and photography with expertise in spatial information processing and remote sensing. We primarily tailor our capabilities to professionals in industries such as civil engineering, surveying, urban planning, architecture, historic preservation, energy, environmental protection, agriculture, property management and brokerage, damage assessment and insurance, tourism, advertising, and event organization.

Beyond the conventional perception of imagery as an artistic form, we began harnessing "flying cameras" in engineering applications to conduct inspections and perform quantitative and qualitative inventories of hard-to-reach and expansive objects. We expanded our capabilities with the use of thermal and near-infrared cameras, enhancing our analysis of fire outbreaks, thermal insulation, and vegetation studies, among other applications. This innovative approach was further complemented by low-altitude photogrammetry techniques, enabling the acquisition of geometrically accurate and georeferenced spatial models. Augmented with data from laser scanning, direct measurements, or multispectral imaging, our company explores the realm of hybrid data and remote sensing.

Name: GIS Survey Committee NZ
Description:
Results for 2023: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1vpJvpBt2PAwX8iBSeExklHf-5mqMe6xB/view?usp=sharing

The GISS Committee formed at the end of 2022 when various geospatial community groups in NZ recognised a need for transparency in the geospatial industry. Who are we? How many of us are there? What sectors do we work in? 

And thus the GISS Committee was born. Representatives from community groups gathered to create the first Geospatial Industry Profile Survey, which ran from March - May 2023. The plan is to run this survey every 2 years to identify trends in the industry and support geospatial careers. 

Many thanks to the following groups for contributing representatives to the GISS Committee:
- Emerging Spatial Professionals NZ
- LocationTech
- Women in Spatial + Surveying
- NZEUG
- Geospatial Capability Committee
- Survey + Spatial New Zealand - Spatial Stream

Preliminary Results for 2023 (NZEUC): https://drive.google.com/file/d/1ims6_n7BpSyaZoOQJdeu4lw5uqjXfkwF/view

decision-making. Our unique advantage lies in our use of high-resolution drone technology,

imagery. We target the over 2 million small to medium-sized farms in the United States, a
significant market opportunity driven by the growing trend towards precision agriculture. Our
vision is to help these farms improve their operations, increase their sustainability, and
ultimately, contribute to a more efficient and resilient food system.

Name: Past Routes
Description:
Past Routes is a Hampshire-based mapping company, founded in the summer of 2022 to help bring historic works and the historic landscape to life.

We make use of almost two decades spent studying and working in the world of archaeology and the historic landscape to create maps with a focus on the past, whilst also showing how it fits into the present.

Each map is created with a minimum amount of interpretation and includes source information, allowing you to investigate places and themes using trusted sources.

Alongside offering published maps, Past Routes can also undertake commissions and other bespoke work. This can be for publications or for specific projects.

We can make use of years of experience, including submitting work to peer-reviewed journals.

In fact the range of applications is broad. Heritage helps to connect communities with their localities and is a useful way to draw people to an area, although much information – of both local and regional interest – never makes it onto widely available maps. We can create tailored maps using our knowledge of a wide range of potential sources.

Vår ambition är att fördjupa och förankra förståelsen av arbetslivets mellanmänskliga dimensioner.

Vi kallar det verksamhetsdiagnostik – ett sätt att se hur uppdrag, ansvar och relationer faktiskt fungerar i vardagen. Genom samtal, observationer och innehållsanalys tydliggör vi mönster i kommunikation, kultur och ledning.

Bakom varje konflikt finns ofta en struktur som tappat sin röst. 
En verksamhetsdiagnos ger en samlad bild av nuläget och visar vägen vidare. 
Först när bilden blir gemensam kan förändring bli möjlig.

Name: Інститут передових технологій
Description:
ПрАТ "Інститут передових технологій" – провідне підприємство у сфері картографії та геоінформаційних технологій України. 

Заснований у 1996 році к.т.н. Олександром Барладіним, Інститут спеціалізується на розробці сучасних картографічних рішень, застосуванні інноваційних ГІС-технологій та створенні високоякісної поліграфічної продукції.

Ми пишаємося тим, що наші розробки використовуються державними установами та приватними компаніями. Серед наших партнерів – Міністерство транспорту України, МОН України, Держтуризмкурорт, ГУ ДСНС, ГУ МВС у м. Києві, посольства різних країн та інші.

Наші ключові напрями діяльності:
Геоінформаційні системи (ГІС): розробка муніципальних та регіональних рішень для оптимізації управління.
Картографія: виробництво навчальних карт і атласів для шкіл України, карт туристичного та автомобільного призначення, глобусів та корпоративних карт.
Цифрові рішення: створення інтерактивних освітніх ресурсів, таких як сайт OSVITANET, мобільні додатки для навчання.
Інновації в поліграфії: захисні технології, ексклюзивні корпоративні рішення.

Розробка першого в Україні навчального ГІС-рішення для виборчих процесів.

Name: DroneHive
Description:
At DroneHive, we make it easy to harness professional drone data for construction, renewables, real estate, agriculture, and more—right here in Southwest England & Surrey. Whether you need a quick roof scan or a full solar‑farm audit, our CAA‑licensed pilots and Master of Engineering–trained analysts deliver reliable, high‑precision insights.

Construction & Infrastructure
We monitor earthworks with volumetric surveys, inspect roofs and powerlines with thermal and high‑res imaging, and stitch everything together into true‑scale orthomosaics and 3D site models.

Renewable Energy
From thermal thermography on solar panels to blade‑surface checks on wind turbines, we help you spot efficiency issues early and avoid costly downtime.

Mapping & Modeling
Photogrammetry and LiDAR give you millimeter‑accurate DSMs, DEMs, and point clouds—perfect for BIM integration, planning permission, and site design.

Real‑Estate Media
High‑res aerial photography, cinematic 4K video, and interactive 3D property fly‑throughs make your listings stand out and close deals faster.

Agriculture & Environment
Our multispectral NDVI flights pinpoint stressed vegetation, optimize irrigation, and guide precise field treatments to boost yields and reduce waste.

Every project is managed through HiveLink, our secure client portal. You’ll get real‑time mission tracking, easy file downloads, and built‑in team sharing—no digging through inboxes.

Ready to see what drone data can do for you? Drop us a line for a no‑obligation quote and let’s plan your next mission together.

Name: GOLNIK & PARTNER Öffentlich bestellte Vermessungsingenieure mbB
Description:
Ihr Vermessungsbüro aus Rostock und Dersum

Wir über uns:

Seit nunmehr 39 Jahren sind wir als erfolgreiches Unternehmen im Bereich der Kataster- und Ingenieurvermessung tätig. In dieser Zeit sind wir mit den Aufgaben gewachsen und können auf langjährige Erfahrungen zurückblicken.

Als Öffentlich bestellte Vermessungsingenieure führen wir, Andreas Golnik und Daniel Golnik, als Träger eines öffentlichen Amtes Liegenschaftsvermessungen und die damit verbundenen Verwaltungserfahren im Land Mecklenburg-Vorpommern durch und sind berechtigt, Tatbestände an Grund und Boden zu beurkunden sowie Auskünfte und Auszüge aus dem Liegenschaftskataster zu erteilen.

Zudem sind wir als Sachverständige und Gutachter im Bereich des Grundstücks- und Bauwesens tätig. Dieser Tätigkeitsbereich umfasst auch die Erstellung von Parteien- oder Gerichtsgutachten bei Grenzstreitigkeiten oder ingenieurtechnischen Sachverhalten.

Im Auftrag des Ministeriums für Landwirtschaft und Umwelt Mecklenburg-Vorpommern bearbeiten wir als geeignete Stelle nach § 53 Abs. 4 Landwirtschaftsanpassungsgesetz (LwAnpG) die Regelung und Neuzuteilung der Eigentumsverhältnisse in Boden- bzw. Flurneuordnungsverfahren.

Unser Tätigkeitsfeld erstreckt sich auch in die vielfältigen Bereiche der Ingenieurvermessung, der Schiffs- und Industrievermessung und der Geoinformationssysteme (GIS) und Geodaten. Hierbei ist unser Wirkungskreis örtlich nicht eingeschränkt, so dass wir inzwischen auch in den Bereichen 3D Vermessung (Laserscanning /-tracking), Reverse Engineering, 3D Modellierung und Produktvergleich sowie Qualitätsprüfung international tätig sind.

Zur Erweiterung unseres Leistungsangebotes oder zur Bündelung von Kapazitäten arbeiten wir in besonderen Fällen seit vielen Jahren erfolgreich auch mit anderen Vermessungs- oder Ingenieurbüros zusammen.

Gern beraten wir auch Sie in allen Fragen des Vermessungs- und Ingenieurwesens. Nutzen und vertrauen Sie unseren langjährigen Erfahrungen.

Name: Birds Eye View Aerial Surveys
Description:
1. Scoping & Planning - We start by conducting an initial assessment to understand the specific needs of your property. This includes discussing the areas to be inspected, identifying any known issues, and noting specific requirements.

Our team designs a detailed flight plan tailored to your site's layout and the areas needing inspection. This ensures comprehensive data capture while maintaining safety and regulatory compliance. 

Before conducting any drone flight, we secure all necessary permissions from local authorities, ensuring full compliance with UK aviation laws and local regulations.

2. Conducting the Survey - Before flight, our team conducts a site walkthrough to identify any obstacles and set up necessary safety measures. This preparation ensures a smooth and secure survey process.

We deploy advanced drones equipped with high-resolution cameras and sensors. These drones are capable of capturing detailed images and videos from various angles, providing a comprehensive view of the property.

The drones capture high-resolution images and 4K videos, gathering precise data on the condition of roofs, gutters, chimneys, and other hard-to-reach areas. 
 
Our pilots follow strict safety protocols, including maintaining safe distances from structures and people, and adhering to all regulatory guidelines to ensure a risk-free operation.

3. Post-Survey Analysis - After the survey, we meticulously review all collected data. This involves processing images and videos to ensure clarity and accuracy, allowing us to pinpoint any issues or areas of concern effectively.

We then compile a comprehensive report based on the survey data. This report includes high-resolution images, detailed findings, and actionable recommendations for any necessary maintenance or repairs.

Our goal is to provide you with clear, insightful information to help you maintain your property efficiently.

Name: PaClimb Map
Description:
PaClimb Map è una mappa che aiuta gli arrampicatori a orientarsi nella natura durante le esperienze outdoor.
Racchiude tutte le pareti, i sentieri, i parcheggi e molti altri dati essenziali per pianificare la propria giornata in falesia.

Cosa puoi fare oggi con PaClimb Map?
- Orientarsi nel territorio ed esplorare tutte le falesie in 3D e 2D su mappe satellitari e topografiche.
- Conoscere per ogni parete le vie presenti, il parcheggio auto, la pagina delle guide cartacee, le ore di luce e ombra nelle 4 stagioni e il percorso per l'avvicinamento.
- Pianificare la tua sessione di arrampicata con la ricerca avanzata, scegliendo le  pareti più adatte a te.
- Seguire in tempo reale il sentiero di avvicinamento alla falesia tramite la tua geolocalizzazione.
- Salvare le falesie e le vie preferite o quelle da voler affrontare nella prossima sessione.
